name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Hunt for Congress Weekly Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Team Hunt had a great week this week. And as the fall approaches, we are positioning ourselves well to compete and win in November.

On Monday, I had the opportunity to join Houston-area small business owners for a roundtable discussion. We discussed the unique challenges facing small businesses today as well as opportunities for Congress to empower entrepreneurs and business owners to build back from the coronavirus stronger than ever. You can read my full statement on our fruitful conversation [here](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=09743d704f8f4987a0c9e93674fd72eb&_e=d2aHZWiXW_wfUhLmQWTp4xzc76Y_K6xZoSxjloy-PV3wNMoJbeNtwdPKZqgOu-gYxXwAuduUBAPYMY0pg9jG4hj2N4_GGvKZslVD2IAa-Yn9ppX5Iy0YuFTHw6TihSmOSemq4ITT2kavpm91PLVrN4oRtI4bVWSm8Zv0nklIcOjOJjsynpba7_5CvbADZiC0DOe0OS_gCe8DdE8TtBdoik5hQPVbnCjiUPAuvFa9E5F1U17NuVrS8S_7Gi6frzA1nJ39nxnB84mVwqQcgKCoWIJCPDCYRiUwap44tRBoBjyQ4QxXNbTB8FsI0IOSHbkDM0havt0mgacJ_xyoiV06VA4xPtmgE1RcyRhQ0pE3Hf0%3D).

_Do you own or operate a small business in Harris County?_ If you'd like to join our Small Business Advisory Committee, please email [Chris@wesleyfortexas.com](mailto:Chris@wesleyfortexas.com)!

On Tuesday, I was humbled to receive Senator Joni Ernst's endorsement of my campaign in the 7th District. Senator Ernst is a remarkable leader in the Senate and a tireless advocate for the men and women of our military. I am honored to receive her endorsement and look forward to working with her in Washington.

On Thursday, I released my position paper on the role of small businesses in our economy, and steps Congress should take to empower our small businesses to lead us out of the coronavirus pandemic. The incredible technological and economic progress our country has enjoyed throughout our history has been due to hardworking Americans seeking to innovate and improve the quality of life in their communities. I believe that through ingenuity and responsible governance, we can emerge from the this downturn stronger than ever. You can find my full paper [here](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=09743d704f8f4987a0c9e93674fd72eb&_e=d2aHZWiXW_wfUhLmQWTp4xzc76Y_K6xZoSxjloy-PV0ahJWuBsDTEGaqiFomr8HYm36sljFf5q5u_aJePy39m9JBwktNzHeEM483JH9oThJHPabSAVCnklbK3_isSsufCbIhrtjM56EMSJ3aNe4WlsRzunVKOTRNP9gZ0i-Y0ZPjI7ycP5aekEAPjDZv86qc7SWbkkacHIFaO9-HbFxf5Lp-Um_F8kElfgqyPE8GlcQ2BNTqqaWgGPNVM3Ys6skcuUFhfxoUp2JoYx3BvSDvpUHQI1OUbi-dIoJDQLiWVKalkauMxbta1IDFXd78fwbK8Xs_9XQdwXeRoyUVimg1bg%3D%3D).

_In case you missed it_ , I released a statement this week condemning Representative Fletcher's response to the violent riots terrorizing the residents of Portland. I am disappointed that Fletcher has once again failed to understand that it is possible to honor and protect the First Amendment right to peaceful assembly without condoning violence, rioting, and looting. You can find my full statement [here](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=09743d704f8f4987a0c9e93674fd72eb&_e=d2aHZWiXW_wfUhLmQWTp4xzc76Y_K6xZoSxjloy-PV2b6MdR1CotiNkRuymm5uj0VKoIi5_urz1fH1ilyiMyZPxJv-VCWqbXX6FLRpGlrFgZy5Kb2qqmeOWKWzR_tU2oVjatScSuO3VTaXauET0Ch-I5jGNctrEpQ9qMQQ1EzvmfCIFNFS_pL2xVx_AoHaqGrc46y76C5I3645W_WMXjkB-ZJv-bzK9dT7qgqMy9B8Fi69iZ6ARTxChIaDX8SGnJdyaXQArI-PcbeM1AnRKi9p-BN_PVyYiCi0q2pamye6-RSlWOnjqyZzJfNd7S7ZoUJ3IGNVnbHEe0jvcudzNSKyNPbIoIGDzwzsNhnl84dKQ%3D).

November is just around the corner, and the incredible outpouring of support Team Hunt has received shows me that we are moving in the right direction. There is more work to do before Election Day, and I am confident we are up to the task. Thank you for your continued support; it is instrumental to our effort to restore conservative values to the 7th District in November.

Thank you,
Wesley

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=09743d704f8f4987a0c9e93674fd72eb&_e=d2aHZWiXW_wfUhLmQWTp4_U82l7wxul-a0Ay4b_tUF0hKGTj929B1ZlF4sHA8ct0HdtI3SfcJr19318M0cnU0Qysm_3TYmokin4MkHX9zoJPXUPSf-bHEVzxIMXd6wtMVnlP-xGqvFQ19z1h78-XIwJte8wbHKA8MwLcthp88ALGGFerVx2DibYrbuAenpHbxsNmJHkZYy2XhslPztrFKoHPh1BArIhu0CmgXNYo8obDkK1jEy8w533QCZjB3jvC7vmzKYGumSZk9fAVCvAVolXNKsxdTyNupY4qs9r4wWI%3D)****
---

Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.
---

Click here to [unsubscribe](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_s=09743d704f8f4987a0c9e93674fd72eb&_t=ELehffH-EfJ2vkU1cUz0u3FcLRHb5tFpFecpf0w3zO6sIyt1tLW1jqLHxvJMWFOU-O31zMLnuPUGMdQq_QkOEVn3m6g_j9tbY2PU2VJO0sS_eYLvlb4i9S3V1Ps5fYE80sFCVqAC2jR1doogC5te9Ey5EoPAVHe9N6juojEVAzs%3D).

name: Joseph R. Biden Jr.
subject: Can I get your response on this, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
The Democratic National Convention is quickly approaching, just 8 days away. |
---
Hey there Peter, it's Joe.

The Democratic National Convention is quickly approaching, just 8 days away. It's going to be a tremendous week for Democrats all over the country to join together, and set the stage for the final two months of this election.

I'm preparing to make the most of convention week, and I had my team pull a list of all the great supporters who have weighed in so far on our pre-convention issue and priorities survey.

**Can you take a moment to fill this out, Peter? I 'd really like to hear your thoughts on the biggest challenges facing our country right now, and how you plan to help the team down the final stretch:** | [TAKE SURVEY](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb0a/1cd0ac28/17f280260/357edc58/2341221887/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/surv-convention-attendee-issue-survey?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.08.02_B1_convention-issues_X__F2_S1_C1__ns-nd-nonopen_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.08.02_B1_convention-issues_X__F2_S1_C1__ns-nd-nonopen_RS")
---
This is a campaign for everyone, Peter. Since the beginning of this pandemic, I've said that we may all be physically apart, but we're all in this fight together.

And I want to make sure that we have the best Democratic National Convention possible, which begins with you taking this issue survey. By adding your response, we can make sure that we address everyone's top priorities during the week of August 17th.

**So, Peter, please don 't pass on this important survey again. Add your response today, and I look forward to seeing your name on the list of respondents:**
[TAKE SURVEY](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb0a/1cd0ac28/17f280260/357edc58/2341221887/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/surv-convention-attendee-issue-survey?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.08.02_B1_convention-issues_X__F2_S1_C1__ns-nd-nonopen_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.08.02_B1_convention-issues_X__F2_S1_C1__ns-nd-nonopen_RS")
---
Thank you so much,

_Joseph R. Biden Jr._
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb0a/1cd0ac28/17f280260/357edc57/2341221887/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb0a/1cd0ac28/17f280260/357edc56/2341221887/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb0a/1cd0ac28/17f280260/357edc55/2341221887/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb0a/1cd0ac28/17f280260/357edc54/2341221887/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb0a/1cd0ac28/17f280260/357edc53/2341221887/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb0a/1cd0ac28/17f280260/357edc52/2341221887/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb0a/1cd0ac28/17f280260/357edc51/2341221887/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb0a/1cd0ac28/17f280260/357edc50/2341221887/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb0a/1cd0ac28/17f280260/357edc4f/2341221887/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb0a/1cd0ac28/17f280260/357edc4e/2341221887/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb0a/1cd0ac28/17f280260/357edc51/2341221887/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb0a/1cd0ac28/17f280260/357edc4d/2341221887/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb0a/1cd0ac28/17f280260/357edc50/2341221887/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb0a/1cd0ac28/17f280260/357edc4c/2341221887/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

name: Rep. Eric Swalwell
subject: [sign] Lt. Col. Vindman's Retirement Card
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
An immigrant and Purple Heart recipient, Lt. Col. Vindman risked his career and safety to speak out against Trump's shake down of Ukraine |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 15th Congressional District. If you no longer wish to receive emails, you can[unsubscribe here](https://act.ericswalwell.com/page/m/4426a51/11666ab/ed9a59e/4e3e59fd/1971658614/VEsH/?g=OIqnD6_HJ6Fc54krRMNRzSA "https://act.ericswalwell.com/page/unsubscribe/") or by emailing [info@ericswalwell.com](mailto:info@ericswalwell.com). _
Lt. Col. Alexander Vindman, a key witness during Trump's impeachment hearings, is retiring from the U.S. Army **because of a coordinated "campaign of bullying, intimidation and retaliation" orchestrated by President Trump and his allies. [Will you join me in signing his retirement card and thank him for his service to our nation? ->](https://act.ericswalwell.com/page/m/4426a51/11666ab/ed9a59e/4e3e59fa/1971658614/VEsE/?g=OIqnD6_HJ6Fc54krRMNRzSA "https://act.ericswalwell.com/page/s/reengage3") ** | [](https://act.ericswalwell.com/page/m/4426a51/11666ab/ed9a59e/4e3e59fa/1971658614/VEsF/?g=OIqnD6_HJ6Fc54krRMNRzSA "https://act.ericswalwell.com/page/s/reengage3")
---
An immigrant and Purple Heart recipient, Lt. Col. Vindman risked his career and safety to speak out against Trump's shake down of Ukraine. _**He truly embodies what it means to be a public servant and patriotic American.**_
It is an absolute disgrace that someone who served his country with such distinction and valor is retiring after being bullied for doing what he was trained to do -- _defend our country._
**We are forever indebted to Lt. Col. Vindman, and we want him to know that the American people are grateful for his service.**
[**Will you sign the card today thanking Lt. Col. Vindman for his service to the United States of America?**](https://act.ericswalwell.com/page/m/4426a51/11666ab/ed9a59e/4e3e59fa/1971658614/VEsC/?g=OIqnD6_HJ6Fc54krRMNRzSA "https://act.ericswalwell.com/page/s/reengage3")
| [SIGN THE CARD ->](https://act.ericswalwell.com/page/m/4426a51/11666ab/ed9a59e/4e3e59fa/1971658614/VEsD/?g=OIqnD6_HJ6Fc54krRMNRzSA "https://act.ericswalwell.com/page/s/reengage3")
---
-- Eric

_Use of Lt. Col. Vindman 's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense._

subject: Week of August 10th Action Items: Tell President Trump to Suspend the Payroll Tax & more
body:
TEA PARTY PATRIOTS ACTION LIVE
THIS AFTERNOON - MONDAY, AUG 10TH @ 1 P.M. ET » [FB.COM](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjIzLTVlNDZjYmMzZmNjZjRjODE4MGRmNGRkYTgxMDUxMDRh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL3BnL3RlYXBhcnR5cGF0cmlvdHM_bWlkPTQyNTA0JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=hvcnFvVdP5wlO6P8E-D5Cw) OR [TPP.US/LIVE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjIzLTVlNDZjYmMzZmNjZjRjODE4MGRmNGRkYTgxMDUxMDRh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvbGl2ZT9taWQ9NDI1MDQmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=t-zzcytSXHWbXbxBrE4a1Q) | |
---
This week, we must urge President Trump to suspend the payroll tax for the rest of the year, and continue to push back against the lies about and censorship of Hydroxychloroquine. We also have a new civics lesson for you and your family to use.
|
---
**Thank President Trump for Suspending the Payroll Tax**
Two of our allies, Steve Moore and Phil Kerpen, have said that President Trump has the legal authority to suspend the payroll tax for the rest of the year via executive action (not illegally, as Barack Obama did all the time). Over the weekend, this is exactly what President Trump did, and we need to thank him for taking action and standing up to Nancy Pelosi!
* **[Read their Wall Street Journal article first.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjIzLTVlNDZjYmMzZmNjZjRjODE4MGRmNGRkYTgxMDUxMDRh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud3NqLmNvbS9hcnRpY2xlcy9ob3ctdHJ1bXAtY2FuLWRlbGl2ZXItdGF4LXJlbGllZi13aXRob3V0LWNvbmdyZXNzLTExNTk2Mzk2ODMwP21pZD00MjUwNCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=XX2fETgdU5um8TJekxqbiQ)** You may need to close a prompt to get you to subscribe to keep reading, but it should allow you to read the whole article after that. [If you still can’t access it, you can read a Fox News article about it.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjIzLTVlNDZjYmMzZmNjZjRjODE4MGRmNGRkYTgxMDUxMDRh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vbWVkaWEvaG93LXRydW1wLWNhbi1jdXQtcGF5cm9sbC10YXgtdW5pbGF0ZXJhbGx5P21pZD00MjUwNCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=zvjvybUHly4CbZC1FgGU8g)
* **[Next, read this memo from the White House about the payroll tax suspension.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjIzLTVlNDZjYmMzZmNjZjRjODE4MGRmNGRkYTgxMDUxMDRh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2hpdGVob3VzZS5nb3YvcHJlc2lkZW50aWFsLWFjdGlvbnMvbWVtb3JhbmR1bS1kZWZlcnJpbmctcGF5cm9sbC10YXgtb2JsaWdhdGlvbnMtbGlnaHQtb25nb2luZy1jb3ZpZC0xOS1kaXNhc3Rlci8_bWlkPTQyNTA0JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=gSULtfRVjZsA7hUdJ062lw)** Reading these items will help you understand how it was legal for President Trump to take executive action.
* **Then, email the White House[using this online contact form](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjIzLTVlNDZjYmMzZmNjZjRjODE4MGRmNGRkYTgxMDUxMDRh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2hpdGVob3VzZS5nb3YvY29udGFjdC8_bWlkPTQyNTA0JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=Ks7mXOaHslH92a9neTzJmA) to tell President Trump thank you!**
* **Finally, thank President Trump on social media if you have a Twitter, Facebook, or other account.** Let’s show him support online because the left and their friends in the media are working hard to disparage President Trump’s actions.

|
---
**Sign and Share the Hydroxychloroquine Letter and the Anti-Censorship Petition**
If you haven’t yet, sign our letter about Hydroxychloroquine and sign our petition to stop the censorship by Big Tech, especially when it comes to information about COVID-19.

**SIGN THE LETTER**
Use this link to sign, and copy it to paste and share on social media or by email: **[https://forms.gle/uSxD7BL9RVFtjFXq7](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjIzLTVlNDZjYmMzZmNjZjRjODE4MGRmNGRkYTgxMDUxMDRh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9mb3Jtcy5nbGUvdVN4RDdCTDlSVkZ0akZYcTc_bWlkPTQyNTA0JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=XKJZF4zgZyakmWQLucgfag)**

**SIGN THE PETITION**
Use this link to sign, and copy it to paste and share on social media or by email:**[https://endtechcensorship.act.teapartypatriots.org](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjIzLTVlNDZjYmMzZmNjZjRjODE4MGRmNGRkYTgxMDUxMDRh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9lbmR0ZWNoY2Vuc29yc2hpcC5hY3QudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmc_bWlkPTQyNTA0JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=GiPB6nVKzwyR1JNbSXNkqA)**
|
---
**Sign and Share the Hydroxychloroquine Letter and the Anti-Censorship Petition**
Continue to share the videos that were censored by Big Tech. It can literally save lives if people know the truth that Big Tech doesn’t want to share.

Use this link to watch, and copy it to paste and share on social media or by email: **[https://www.teapartypatriots.org/americas-frontline-doctors-summit](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjIzLTVlNDZjYmMzZmNjZjRjODE4MGRmNGRkYTgxMDUxMDRh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvYW1lcmljYXMtZnJvbnRsaW5lLWRvY3RvcnMtc3VtbWl0P21pZD00MjUwNCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=HzZ-XCw3mAWyybVKxZvrRg)**
|
---
**Make Real Civics Education a Priority Again
Week of August 10th
**
Keep an eye out every week for a new activity or book or lesson to bring real civics back to our children. **[Download this week’s lesson as a PDF here.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjIzLTVlNDZjYmMzZmNjZjRjODE4MGRmNGRkYTgxMDUxMDRh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL1RQUC1DaXZpY3MtTGVzc29uLXdlZWstb2YtQXVnLTEwLnBkZj9taWQ9NDI1MDQmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=VXxN0Q7p8ZxILt2p_9sAfQ)**

**This week, we will learn about the Electoral College.** With the left continuously attacking the Electoral College, trying to eliminate it, and indoctrinating children about it, your kids need to know the facts. The Electoral College can be a bit confusing, so we recommend that if your kids or grandkids are on the younger side, we recommend that you read, listen, and watch the resources below on your own, and then you can decide how much of it to share with them, and in what form.

Read... **[Imprimus: The Danger of the Attacks on the Electoral College by Trent England](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjIzLTVlNDZjYmMzZmNjZjRjODE4MGRmNGRkYTgxMDUxMDRh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9pbXByaW1pcy5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L2Rhbmdlci1hdHRhY2tzLWVsZWN0b3JhbC1jb2xsZWdlLz9taWQ9NDI1MDQmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=JTEBgtlT1vRlVSjvoT3Ctw)**

Listen... **[Hillsdale Dialogue: The Electoral College](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjIzLTVlNDZjYmMzZmNjZjRjODE4MGRmNGRkYTgxMDUxMDRh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTE%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9ibG9nLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvb25saW5lLWNvdXJzZXMvdGhlLWVsZWN0b3JhbC1jb2xsZWdlP21pZD00MjUwNCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=D7ODTYGynaZP6ssqsULeNg)**

Watch... **[PragerU: Do You Understand the Electoral College?](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjIzLTVlNDZjYmMzZmNjZjRjODE4MGRmNGRkYTgxMDUxMDRh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTI%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucHJhZ2VydS5jb20vdmlkZW8vZG8teW91LXVuZGVyc3RhbmQtdGhlLWVsZWN0b3JhbC1jb2xsZWdlLz9taWQ9NDI1MDQmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=ZJhyNJTNoMh0izx5M_l6QA)**

**Discussion Questions**
* Discuss the concept of a “pure democracy” vs. a “republic,” and why our Founders decided against a pure democracy. The example in the PragerU video is an easy place to start.
* What are the benefits of the Electoral College?
* Why would some people want to eliminate the Electoral College?

In liberty,

Jenny Beth Martin

|

The Electoral College can be a bit confusing, so we recommend that if your kids or grandkids are on the younger side, we recommend that you read, listen, and watch the resources below on your own, and then you can decide how much of it to share with them, and in what form. Read... Listen... Watch... Discussion Questions Discuss the concept of a “pure democracy” vs. a “republic,” and why our Founders decided against a pure democracy. The example in the PragerU video is an easy place to start. What are the benefits of the Electoral College? Why would some people want to eliminate the Electoral College? In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin | Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes. © 2020 80 M St SE, First Floor, Washington, D.C. 20003 | **

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: My friend, Jon Ossoff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
Jon will be a powerful voice for Georgians |
---
Friend,

Last year, Georgia passed HB 481, a cruel, dangerous anti-choice bill that banned abortion at six weeks.

_A U.S. district court blocked the abortion ban's enforcement last year before it went into effect, but it was a close call and we can't become complacent._

**A woman's right to choose is on the ballot EVERY election, especially in Georgia. That's why I'm proud to endorse Jon Ossoff for U.S. Senate in Georgia.**

**We can't afford another two years of a Mitch McConnell-controlled Senate confirming anti-choice judges and trying to eliminate access to abortion and overturn _Roe v. Wade_.**

_We need to elect strong pro-choice Democrats like Jon this November -- and we only need to flip four seats to win a majority in the Senate._

**[Today, will you join me in supporting Jon Ossoff's surging campaign to end McConnell's majority and protect access to abortion?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2756/5b2c1286/3eb95aeb/25f1e52a/3214461101/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_10_end_kg?refcode=em_2020_08_10_end_kg")**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| | [Express Donate: $5](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2756/5b2c1286/3eb95aeb/25f1e52d/3214461101/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_10_end_kg?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_2020_08_10_end_kg_ex_5")
---
| [Express Donate: $10](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2756/5b2c1286/3eb95aeb/25f1e52c/3214461101/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_10_end_kg?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_2020_08_10_end_kg_ex_10")
---
| [Express Donate: $25](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2756/5b2c1286/3eb95aeb/25f1e52f/3214461101/VEsC/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_10_end_kg?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em_2020_08_10_end_kg_ex_25")
---
| [Express Donate: $50](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2756/5b2c1286/3eb95aeb/25f1e52e/3214461101/VEsD/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_10_end_kg?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_2020_08_10_end_kg_ex_50")
---
| [Express Donate: $100](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2756/5b2c1286/3eb95aeb/25f1e531/3214461101/VEsA/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_10_end_kg?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_2020_08_10_end_kg_ex_100")
---
| [Or donate another amount](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2756/5b2c1286/3eb95aeb/25f1e530/3214461101/VEsB/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_10_end_kg?express_lane_other=true&refcode=em_2020_08_10_end_kg_ex_other")
---
**Jon will be a powerful voice for Georgians and fight tirelessly to protect our health care and our livelihood.**

I know Jon and his wife Dr. Alisha Kramer, an OB-GYN in Atlanta, believe women, not the government, should control the private, personal, and complex decisions about their own health care.

The media company Jon runs has gone undercover to expose how dangerous, unqualified, and unregulated abortion providers kill thousands of women in places where safe abortion services are not available legally.

He has already vowed to only vote to confirm federal judges who _pledge to uphold _Roe v. Wade__.

**And he's surging in the polls, neck and neck with embattled Republican David Perdue in a race that is now officially a toss-up.**

Mitch McConnell is terrified of losing Georgia and his grip on the Senate. His super PACs are already pouring tens of millions of dollars into stopping Jon.

_They're scared, friend, and they should be!_

**Georgia is 2020's front-line state for control of the U.S. Senate and a woman's right to choose.**

**And Jon is the right candidate to turn Georgia blue.**

_But it's up to supporters like you and me to make sure he has the resources he needs to win. For Jon to win this tight race against a well-funded Republican opponent, he needs all of our support._

**[Please, if you care about ending McConnell's stronghold on the Senate and fighting for a woman's right to choose, chip in $10 right now to elect Jon Ossoff in Georgia.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2756/5b2c1286/3eb95aeb/25f1e533/3214461101/VEsO/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_10_end_kg?refcode=em_2020_08_10_end_kg&amount=10")**
| [Chip in $10 now >>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2756/5b2c1286/3eb95aeb/25f1e533/3214461101/VEsP/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_10_end_kg?refcode=em_2020_08_10_end_kg&amount=10")
---
With gratitude,

Kirsten

clean_body: Jon will be a powerful voice for Georgians | Friend, Last year, Georgia passed HB 481, a cruel, dangerous anti-choice bill that banned abortion at six weeks. A U.S. district court blocked the abortion ban's enforcement last year before it went into effect, but it was a close call and we can't become complacent. A woman's right to choose is on the ballot EVERY election, especially in Georgia. That's why I'm proud to endorse Jon Ossoff for U.S. Senate in Georgia. We can't afford another two years of a Mitch McConnell-controlled Senate confirming anti-choice judges and trying to eliminate access to abortion and overturn Roe v. Wade. We need to elect strong pro-choice Democrats like Jon this November -- and we only need to flip four seats to win a majority in the Senate. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Jon will be a powerful voice for Georgians and fight tirelessly to protect our health care and our livelihood. I know Jon and his wife Dr. Alisha Kramer, an OB-GYN in Atlanta, believe women, not the government, should control the private, personal, and complex decisions about their own health care. The media company Jon runs has gone undercover to expose how dangerous, unqualified, and unregulated abortion providers kill thousands of women in places where safe abortion services are not available legally. He has already vowed to only vote to confirm federal judges who pledge to uphold Roe v. Wade. And he's surging in the polls, neck and neck with embattled Republican David Perdue in a race that is now officially a toss-up. Mitch McConnell is terrified of losing Georgia and his grip on the Senate. His super PACs are already pouring tens of millions of dollars into stopping Jon. They're scared, friend, and they should be! Georgia is 2020's front-line state for control of the U.S. Senate and a woman's right to choose. And Jon is the right candidate to turn Georgia blue. But it's up to supporters like you and me to make sure he has the resources he needs to win. For Jon to win this tight race against a well-funded Republican opponent, he needs all of our support. "" | "" With gratitude, Kirsten | This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com "" | "" | P.O. Box 450326, Atlanta, GA 31145 PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE

Wearing a mask is a simple yet effective way to better protect your loved ones, neighbors, and others in your community. Up until last week, our state did not have a mask requirement, and cases have been surging. Mississippi has the highest positivity rate of new cases, and our hospitals are struggling to get by. #
We have an exciting update to share with you! **Today, we launched our new website.** You can check it out by [clicking here](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=40a24e35e3&e=140a9b81e7)!

This new website will make it easier to find what you're looking for. Whether you want to know more about our latest endorsements, catch up on the news from the campaign trail, learn more about where we stand on the issues or listen to Dani's latest interviews, our new website makes it easy to find what you're looking for!

Our updated website is part of our new digital outreach and organizing strategy, which will be a huge part of our success as we campaign during these unprecedented times. Making sure we have a great digital presence is more important now than ever.

You can help us make sure our digital efforts are successful by [chipping in with a donation.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=49cfc9fc9d&e=140a9b81e7)** Every dollar we raise helps us contact more voters, and every voter we contact puts us one step closer to flipping this seat from red to blue!**

Team Dani

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: John Lewis' legacy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is:
body:
| | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zdovuQh6AnzseedbOztB5U3N720NDadj7zRuigSklZR1xgW2n6PbpcQ8pkyGpwiixEWFpH1tNpQv2wv5I8EKOYd887i-Wb0UKVQ9B1BpX56i3r-9PGg5bezUtmvh2Ah4I-uBdeCJzBsSSLmAtyqcW0sTR374CVzSPNnBw6xN3a-wwDjrw7TAy3mBI_BdvBa29XemxTQxKmBzKkeIi1-gGi6RwAu0SAnRyVh2VuSroT7B9-ODsaBCycPg8KHvelHEd3TbUNyItUjwz4M5G02in99oi2aqL5vCf4ZsEq1F__SHa4zRUWc7BUpirI8gwTLX-AEWtMBdBXOmKYbaPpoQ8v/347/0eYYAq_RQBKKZp7409mMbg/h0/-ai3NbkiafEgLMlIu202WwuBe1Goh7zVXCA7y5SeE-w) Dear friends, Last month, Congressman John Lewis passed away after a truly remarkable life — one that helped change this country for the better. John Lewis was 23 years old when he delivered his fiery speech at the March on Washington, and he was 25 when he risked his life marching across the Edmund Pettus Bridge in Selma, Alabama. Thanks to him, millions of Americans across the country could no longer ignore the racism that was so apparent to Black Americans. John Lewis created a moment that culminated in the passage of the Voting Rights Act in 1965, our most impactful civil rights legislation to date. During his 33-year tenure in the House of Representatives, Congressman Lewis was known as the “Conscience of the Congress.” He had the courage of his conviction, the education of his experiences, and the passion for his principles. He knew what it was like to face hardship in our society, and believed that no one else should have to face the same. He was an inspiration to me, and to so many. That’s why I was so proud to be included in a group of incoming members of Congress that **[USA Today spotlighted](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDFPZEzZ6wEhLpaimocMRJcTVmQ78mVPSosGQrqoCDbXoqd1dEXVR---K_HAGMYlXQKhGSxtvbh9ZcSHoJFIoTZZcEkT8GsGWkV2LQqZ-7hQXpPEA4tWE7auHfKBfsXPdbU7wVnUHEL4YZUop5c0HqjfSzz9gw4emkHXM26n4LPI0KrSuihbz4BwnSNR8loqH-nyNcCksE-fgB0iePnLTV4ZY7AGcc0Rd21FJy2RCQyDoWljQTz49-sFPuOhOsebUfQVzvtB86d2wR9vV1eikReaZY8kSmlwRtFOjI4-LkLMr-LI4E36m-cJZBbVFSmBt9JW6UHIrTVLp-tupPPTQWBxSGeKRa_JQzVAYuTiaTsTv/347/0eYYAq_RQBKKZp7409mMbg/h1/mS8GrmfaDTgryH_C2dvQX5yhEw55d6B4Fn7V2CksK7U)** as ready to follow in Congressman Lewis’ footsteps. I’m ready to get to Congress to continue John Lewis’ legacy — including, and especially, fighting to restore the Voting Rights Act. In the words of John Lewis, I’m ready to make “good trouble, necessary trouble.” With your support, I’ll be able to do just that. Onward,

name: MJ Hegar
subject: Wondering about my tattoos?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Let me tell you the story behind them.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e71/7f51f7bc/4097f53a/4ef785af/2462265831/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e71/7f51f7bc/4097f53a/4ef785ad/2462265831/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4ODAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200810.1nd__1880__&amount=10")
---

[PITCH IN](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e71/7f51f7bc/4097f53a/4ef785ad/2462265831/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4ODAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200810.1nd__1880__&amount=10")
---
A lot of people ask about my tattoos, and I think it's an important story for you to hear, Peter.

When I was flying a medevac mission in Afghanistan, my helicopter came under fire and I took shrapnel to my arm and shoulder. We continued the mission and managed to get our crew and patients to safe ground, and held out surrounded by enemy fighters until rescue choppers made it to us. As our wounded were loaded into one of the helicopters, I strapped myself to the skids of the other and returned fire as we flew back to base.

The shrapnel left scars all across my shoulder and arm, and they were a constant reminder of the pain of that day. So I decided to turn the scars with something beautiful -- my tattoos.

Why am I telling you this? To show you that **I know how to face tough challenges.** Winning this race and then leading in the U.S. Senate won't be easy, but this team can get it done -- just like my team did on that day in Afghanistan. **[Will you help me in my fight, Peter?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e71/7f51f7bc/4097f53a/4ef785ad/2462265831/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4ODAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200810.1nd__1880__&amount=10")**

Look, I upheld my oath to our country when facing down 150 Taliban fighters that day. You better believe that I won't cower to the special interests or Washington bosses. I'll put country over politics in the Senate, always.

**But I need your help to get there. Can you make a donation today?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---

clean_body: Let me tell you the story behind them. | "" | | | "" "" A lot of people ask about my tattoos, and I think it's an important story for you to hear, Peter. When I was flying a medevac mission in Afghanistan, my helicopter came under fire and I took shrapnel to my arm and shoulder. We continued the mission and managed to get our crew and patients to safe ground, and held out surrounded by enemy fighters until rescue choppers made it to us. As our wounded were loaded into one of the helicopters, I strapped myself to the skids of the other and returned fire as we flew back to base. The shrapnel left scars all across my shoulder and arm, and they were a constant reminder of the pain of that day. So I decided to turn the scars with something beautiful -- my tattoos. Why am I telling you this? To show you that I know how to face tough challenges. Winning this race and then leading in the U.S. Senate won't be easy, but this team can get it done -- just like my team did on that day in Afghanistan. "" Look, I upheld my oath to our country when facing down 150 Taliban fighters that day. You better believe that I won't cower to the special interests or Washington bosses. I'll put country over politics in the Senate, always. But I need your help to get there. Can you make a donation today? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" "" \-- MJ "" | | It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. "" However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, "". We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time. MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard. MJ for Texas P.O. Box 7156 Round Rock, TX 78683 Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax-deductible. | | Paid for by MJ for Texas | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please "".

With so many special guests joining us for the Convention, it's sure to be an action-packed week to remember! And this commemorative ticket will be your way to remember the week Democrats from across the country came together to nominate Joe Biden and wage the battle for the soul of this nation.

**So we have to ask one more time, Peter. Do you want your personalized Team Joe Convention Ticket? Become one of our grassroots donors today by chipping in $5 or more and we 'll put yours in the mail soon!**

Team Joe

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb17/1cd0ac28/17f4b33e3/357edc0c/3799772470/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/bvf-unsubscribe/").

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- Biden Victory Fund
Paid for by Biden Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Biden for President, the Democratic National Committee and the State Democratic Parties in these states: AK, AL, AZ, CO, DE, FL, GA, ID, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, PA, SC, TN, TX, VA, VT, WI, AND WV.
_Contributions or gifts to Biden Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

The first $5,600/$10,000 from a person/multicandidate committee ("PAC") will be allocated to Biden for President, with the first $2,800/$5,000 designated for the primary and the next $2,800/$5,000 for the general election. For contributions made after the primary, the full amount of the contribution, up to $2,800/$5,000, will be designated for the general election. The next $35,500/$15,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to the DNC. The next $150,000/$75,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AZ, CO, FL, GA, MI, MN, NC, NE, NH, NV, OH, PA, TX, VA, and WI. The next $110,000/$55,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AL, DE, KS, LA, MA, MD, MS, NJ, NY, VT, and WV. The next $110,000/$55,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AK, ID, IN, KY, ME, MO, MT, ND, NM, SC, and TN. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC, subject to applicable contribution limits.

The allocation listed above may change if a contributor designates their contribution for a particular participant(s) or if following it would result in an excessive contribution. Contributions will be used in connection with federal elections, may be spent on any activity as each committee determines in its sole discretion, and will not be earmarked for any particular candidate. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle._

name: Jason Yates
subject: The Election of Our Lifetime Virtual Meeting: The MFV Election Plan
body:
Peter,
In 2016 we activated millions of Christians to bring their values to the polls and vote. A stunning 85 percent of the Christians we reached turned out to vote.
My Faith Votes didn’t do this alone; you helped make it possible, and influential Christian leaders joined us in this mission.
Now, in 2020, we’ve developed a strategy to reach non-voting Christians in ten key target states to turn out millions of believers to vote across the country.
**[We’ve set up a special online meeting, Thursday, August 13 at 8 PM ET / 5 PM PT to share our full plans](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUeka61HMTpwyYlMo_sz7NlW7W2V1AI02IzRTwpg82-_FTHbEyYT0qRMxUY_wbIFL4XfYnhCi253867cci5jY5cojIpA1-uMC5v4fHyeue8zaIeonD9srVdeeKxduikNaQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200810com01&n=1).** We want you to learn more about our strategy from both our team and the Christian leaders working with us.
The meeting speakers include: **Mike Huckabee, Dr. David Jeremiah, Sarah Huckabee Sanders, Ret. Lt. Col. Allen West, and Hon. Ken Starr.**
[RSVP to attend and receive a personal link for this meeting](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUeka61HMTpwyYlMo_sz7NlW7W2V1AI02IzRTwpg82-_FTHbEyYT0qRMxUY_wbIFL4XfYnhCi253867cci5jY5cojIpA1-uMC5v4fHyeue8zaIeonD9srVdeeKxduikNaQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200810com01&n=2). I’ll be frank; our plan relies on you. We need as many Christians as possible to join us on this proven strategy between now and November.
Don’t miss this time together. You will leave with unique insight on what’s happening in our country and a clear action plan on what you can do between now and November to make a difference.
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUeka61HMTpwyYlMo_sz7NlW7W2V1AI02IzRTwpg82-_FTHbEyYT0qRMxUY_wbIFL4XfYnhCi253867cci5jY5cojIpA1-uMC5v4fHyeue8zaIeonD9srVdeeKxduikNaQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200810com01&n=3)
**United. We Stand.**
Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200810com01&n=4)
©2020 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker Rd, #640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200810com01&n=5).

[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/f41fef8cbf21969d/123906559b1c114bc3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, This is great news! My campaign just got another big endorsement by a Granite State heavyweight, and we are one step closer to beating Jeanne Shaheen this fall. **State Senator Chuck Morse (R - Salem) officially endorsed my campaign this week, because he knows that I am far and away the best choice to represent New Hampshire in the U.S. Senate**. Senator Morse is a seven-term state senator, and former Senate president. He _knows_ I have the grit to stand up to the D.C. elites, and put Granite Staters in front of petty political games. Here’s what he had to say about my race: [ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/f41fef8cbf21969d/9bc53810d468e7bcc3d6b838967d376c/33153) I am incredibly honored to receive Chuck’s endorsement. He has long supported conservative values, and has always stood up against special interests pushing a radical, progressive agenda. Will you stand with Chuck Morse and show your support to my campaign by chipping in what you can now? [Chip in $5 for Corky! >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/f41fef8cbf21969d/314659e9255d4925c3d6b838967d376c/33153) [Chip in $10 for Corky! >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/f41fef8cbf21969d/7b1b37d805292304c3d6b838967d376c/33153) [Chip in $25 for Corky! >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/f41fef8cbf21969d/172276439e44366cc3d6b838967d376c/33153) [Chip in $50 for Corky! >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/f41fef8cbf21969d/3fea3d10a53342e0c3d6b838967d376c/33153) [Chip in $100 for Corky! >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/f41fef8cbf21969d/0f6a1631dddaee41c3d6b838967d376c/33153) I’m so grateful for all the endorsements I’ve gotten over the course of my campaign, including Sen. Morse’s and President Donald Trump’s. But they aren’t going to matter unless we’re able to reach the voters and get them to the polls. Every dollar donated helps spread our conservative message, and get Granite Staters to the ballot box. **Will you donate what you can today to show your commitment to beating D.C. Jeanne Shaheen this November?** [Donate NOW >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/f41fef8cbf21969d/49ee97821f55ad28c3d6b838967d376c/33153) I know we can do it, but I’m going to need your help for victory! Thanks for your support,
Corky Messner id:2020-08-07-13:45:20:960t | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/f41fef8cbf21969d/2672c84185aded35c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/f41fef8cbf21969d/fb213d911bd3c04ec3d6b838967d376c/33153)

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: Trump's USPS Friday Night Massacre
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good VA
body:
| | |
Dear Derek,
Recently, I wrote our grassroots team about Donald Trump's attacks on the Postal Service. You can read my full message below, but I wanted to give you another troubling update.
On Friday, former Trump campaign donor and new Postmaster General Louis DeJoy FIRED top Postal Service executives and reshuffled dozens of key leadership positions throughout the agency.
It's another shameless attempt to sabotage the Postal Service just months before the 2020 election.

Derek, more Americans are expected to vote by mail than ever before this November. Trump's attacks on the Postal Service are a serious threat to our democracy and we can't stay silent.
**[Will you join me in standing up to Donald Trump by adding your name and making your voice heard?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnn8mX1GnZjjO05pkrRBnN1PO1zHgsOtVLW3XBeF-laL5GDgt7p1Q2W67iOaHXX13QxB_PoGYiSoWEI-Ge1EeAC4gVCE4wfdA7oiy92F0YU56rVycf_QOeDNDc_kgzXIiV9AqrUzjpjL7It1TIp0vFdlRvR9NtDYXfjAZOWz0O_xhZL0NlIULHEd7is1BcBZv-gniuri7J8I6tN3bkp43bSJmJNyJu86OAjt4QaCPjMxnrTuH8CRQ2GX4y13yGfqvaC9VSRHeF1iIJpHA2FM1iUPdSuR96zKxcWN6RZXz0mgR4aydEA11XQwFUMCfVTTfjjlFnFJM1Erb59joyYB2Ja3uvxkmgPQ9e8-o_qTgHdkHA/347/9ySRO_kdQM-L0z8ksMHS_A/h0/mKg2rB_mj1JkCps-8dhM90vBv_e-fNqiv0slVOhJ6I0)** **
** Thank you,
Terry
\-----Forwarded message-----

Dear Derek,
Donald Trump’s attacks on the U.S. Postal Service aren’t going away. In May, Trump appointed a top donor named Louis DeJoy to run the USPS. Now reports of slow mail are coming from all over the country, including here in Virginia. It’s disturbing and it couldn’t be happening at a worse time. More Virginians than ever will be voting by mail in 2020. We need to know that Postal Service employees are getting everything they need to safely and efficiently do their jobs. **[I’m looking for 5000 grassroots supporters to call on Donald Trump to stop his attacks on the Postal Service. Can you add your name?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnn8mX1GnZjjO05pkrRBnN1PO1zHgsOtVLW3XBeF-laL5GDgt7p1Q2W67iOaHXX13QxB_PoGYiSoWEI-Ge1EeAC4UxMWJ0AihOVMQKBXVDMFrojRQXFThyc5bIR9irKQ9AKiexbbmqeEgEpR-OjmUDeKW_YhnuT4WpMHf0t9zWT8gVxMsLGwopK7ZkGbBoZ3fpR5RCul_vEt3U6S20HKVwEgTkdWckKr3KSr8dxRWMUEbPbYcYZntsu0bYaiggv26beO_ZwbB7tyeCMKZVnHc01V_lQYbZNxc1maEmg9W8nWwuQWYZBNbGi8s5xjUCuKdm2w9730_YQi8IhcMG-5CTNPXPd9P9Ov-U1dWLPYBaOC7Q/347/9ySRO_kdQM-L0z8ksMHS_A/h1/NG5oWO_TFv0CswW4p4DJbtsEw1AaX1hsOJqpJUiK6Kg)** Trump’s attacks on the Postal Service aren’t happening in a vacuum. He’s called the Postal Service a “joke.” He’s endangered the jobs of 600,000 federal workers by refusing to help the USPS through its financial crisis. Now his buddy DeJoy is slowing down the mail before the most important election in a generation. **[Please add your name right now and demand Donald Trump end the attacks on the Postal Service.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnn8mX1GnZjjO05pkrRBnN1PO1zHgsOtVLW3XBeF-laL5GDgt7p1Q2W67iOaHXX13QxB_PoGYiSoWEI-Ge1EeAC4P_VozzYnwF5JoRFJWq5oC8EYYJXZBinefZZ9vw64SGj9fUBNT9jAVcMa9W5Q21r2g3werTHpcxvaXK623LTkCNJQuM7A2nOplDlRgCNTa4xTmjkIIPR88rS11kQRopq04hAOUmTgXkFkaBouFjmklAnuUYPZ-XzXifMjOMvp6pTt49vR4pUTd1lpETrL84PNfH8SBaQhhzEQyYJSuh6aPTdLbo0OZwV6PoZGQbNWeoofuStMX_drcW8g9YkaRBwF-XEHkbeDRvYCUTutXZu7yw/347/9ySRO_kdQM-L0z8ksMHS_A/h2/ha3Jk702Q5Es0iPkM1_3QwO34jG2MNMvzM1jpMVUpfs)** Thank you, Terry

| [**DONATE »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miMlYzrDTXorh54W6kP4vaL6HEDK186TGgbsKduPa7wTxlgV79DFMFwLQ0kfa-exz37rC-VYlo3LrKRDn6K5fU_aKrQLgjoA027iazfUk3BPTCEgexQFr_FnYwexK4KgmPsp2Hg9Vw-5dsph6V1cWXwWHjZBit8PEk3fmrz9UshdJpZ4BgkEkG3d20nDKc5kFuMGpEkJkERZPfDto4bF2_5S0ptn4NJyrzHpu3IApAzOXckXzq30YwXFXcMDIOnFWpsH50Z616rqkNI2rQ6tuJT-zYSh-HeU2hu0ognjNyu5RzvHM41Po7-Qxe9iEe3cRNhVLroj_6rpwrU4ajrHM8tdV339Lm-EkGWqj22dIoToE/347/9ySRO_kdQM-L0z8ksMHS_A/h3/srFwpq5NGuPI3NsS-8jRJsUht3UxtTqCvI_EuEMg30Q)

name: Susan Collins
subject: I need as many donors as possible TODAY
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
****

Now, they're focused on coming after me **personally**.

China knows that if they can sanction me and silence my voice, they will be able to get away with anything.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Trump Announces Aid for Jobless, Renters, Student Loan Borrowers
body:
President Trump signed four executive actions Saturday to provide Americans with more financial relief from the Coronavirus pandemic | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5f16e46a08&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Trump Announces Aid for Jobless, Renters, Student Loan Borrowers**

President Trump signed four executive actions Saturday to provide Americans with more financial relief from the Coronavirus pandemic, Marisa Schultz reports for Fox News.

The four actions will provide unemployed Americans with $400-a-week in supplemental unemployment aid, assist renters and homeowners who are struggling to pay their lease or mortgage, defer payroll taxes for employees making $100,000 or less per year, and suspend federal student loan payments through the end of 2020.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4d73145388&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “If you’ve paid any attention to the news, particularly cable news, over the last couple of months since George Floyd’s killing by police in Minneapolis, you might think ‘defunding’ or ‘abolishing’ the police is a widely held and even somewhat mainstream desire. Gallup suggests this is untrue. The vast majority of Americans of all races and ethnicities don’t want the police to leave their communities,” Jonah Goldberg writes in the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=95eef1e95a&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Videos circulating online show widespread looting and clashes with police across Chicago’s Magnificent Mile shopping district early Monday . . . The unrest capped off another violent weekend in Chicago that included three deaths. At least 35 people were shot,” Greg Norman and Edmund DeMarche report. “This was not an organized protest,” Chicago Police Superintendent David Brown said. Read more in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2bf76533c6&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “The prevalence of violence, drugs, and illicit activities disproportionately affects Indian Country and Alaska Native villages. Using the tools at his disposal, President Trump is working alongside American Indians and Alaska Natives to change that,” Assistant Interior Secretary for Indian Affairs Tara Katuk Sweeney writes in [_The Federalist_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=90ed34432c&e=3ee4985eea) _._
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c2470e2208&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=59d21a120f&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=00b7bd5180)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

Peter,

From the very start of this campaign, I’ve made sure Upstate New Yorkers are at the forefront of my campaign.

_That means I consider EVERY supporter’s opinion while setting my agenda._

Whether it’s lowering taxes and cutting back wasteful spending, creating jobs and growing our economy, or repealing and replacing Obamacare, I want to hear from YOU.

With so many important battles ahead I want to hear from you as soon as possible on this. Where do you stand? What are your top priorities?

Republicans are planning on spending $6.4 million in greater Houston to stop Sri and our campaign. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = We have a real shot at flipping Texas blue in 2020. And if we do that, it will affect our political system for years to come. That’s why the special interests in Washington are terrified. Flipping Texas blue would end their agenda of protecting their wealthy backers’ profit margins -- and they’re willing to spend historic amounts of money to protect the status quo. But friend, we’re in this fight to change the status quo. We’re in this fight to protect and expand health care for millions of Americans and ensure our road to economic recovery works for everyone, not just the super-rich. And as we stare down this daunting amount of money pouring into our community to try and buy this election, we know we can prevail. We just need your help to do it. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thanks, Matt Gaze Finance Director Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas. Please visit our to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe. | = Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington. | = Bringing true representation to TX-22. **David Perdue is one of this year's most vulnerable Senators!**

Friend -- the day after Jon Ossoff's opponent, David Perdue, made Roll Call's list of most vulnerable Senators, their Senate battle in Georgia made the _Washington Post's list of most competitive Senate races of 2020_!

**Jon is surging, and the GOP is panicking.**

_Last week, Mitch McConnell's super PAC poured another $6 million into the state and Donald Trump held a Georgia tele-rally to bail out Perdue and his own re-election._

Friend, we'll keep this brief. With less than three months until Election Day, we're in a strong position to win this race.

| | We’ll always be unforgiving in our pursuit of a more equitable future. That’s why our campaign is standing strong in our support for Medicare for All. _We’ll always be looking out for the people — not corporations and bottom lines._ **That’s why it always makes us FURIOUS that Republican Michael McCaul continues to serve in Congress even though he’s made it ABUNDANTLY clear whose side he is on...** _(spoiler alert: it’s not yours)_ _Just take a look at a few of McCaul’s RECKLESS votes on healthcare:_

name: Politico News Alert via Eugene for Congress
subject: House GOP super PAC: “We’re doubling down...”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:

subject: Calling all business owners
body:
| | | |
---
| Friends,

We are compiling a list of business owners for a business advisory council and if you own a business we would love for you to be a part of it!

In Congress I will fight for small businesses by getting people back to work, eliminating burdensome regulations and ensuring that small businesses are protected in this COVID pandemic.

As a doctor, veteran and former small business owner, I will go to work for you!

[Click here to join our business owners coalition!](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=e79849f3a8&e=16fac31a0f)

Thank you for your support!

Mariannette Miller-Meeks

name: Julian Brave NoiseCat
subject: What the Dakota Access Pipeline shut down actually means
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
This is good news. But it's not the full story.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=2&akid=1985%2E53494%2E6C_3iS) Friend, Last month, after years of resistance by the Standing Rock Sioux Tribe and their allies, a judge ordered the Dakota Access Pipeline to shut down. This is good news. But it's not the full story. Before I tell you the story -- and it's as damning a tale as any told about this nation's dealings with its First Peoples -- I'm going to ask you to use your voice today to support Indigenous Peoples around the world and across the country. **[Please add your name now to tell moneyed fossil fuel interests that you won't stand idly by as they disregard Indigenous rights and something as basic as access to clean water.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/682?t=3&akid=1985%2E53494%2E6C_3iS)** | [ADD YOUR NAME ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/682?t=4&akid=1985%2E53494%2E6C_3iS)
---
[](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/682?t=5&akid=1985%2E53494%2E6C_3iS)
---
Though you've probably already heard much of it, here's the synopsis:
An oil pipeline (which counted Donald Trump as one of its investors) was rerouted from the predominantly white city of Bismarck to run directly through the treaty lands and drinking-water supply of the Standing Rock Sioux Tribe. When the tribe protested and filed a lawsuit, the National Guard was sent in. Protestors and activists who came to support the Standing Rock Sioux were met by weapons of war -- in fact, some of these federal agents were _better_ armed than militaries, with weapons like surface-to-air missile launchers.
After months, President Obama intervened, ordering an environmental review. But days after his inauguration, President Trump reversed the decision, and oil began flowing through the pipeline later that year.
While last month's news that the pipeline must be emptied is undoubtedly something to celebrate, this is not the first or last battle in this centuries-old fight. The history of the Dakota Access Pipeline just shows how precarious Indigenous rights are and how committed we collectively need to be to protecting and advancing those rights.
**[We're just getting started in the long fight for Indigenous rights and clean water. Sign on today to show you stand with the Indigenous community, too.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/682?t=6&akid=1985%2E53494%2E6C_3iS)**
Thanks,
Julian Brave NoiseCat
Member of the Canim Lake Band Tsq'escen and a descendant of the Lil'Wat Nation of Mount Currie
Advisory Board Member, Evergreen Action
Vice President of Policy and Strategy, Data for Progress

clean_body: This is good news. But it's not the full story. | Friend, Last month, after years of resistance by the Standing Rock Sioux Tribe and their allies, a judge ordered the Dakota Access Pipeline to shut down. This is good news. But it's not the full story. Before I tell you the story -- and it's as damning a tale as any told about this nation's dealings with its First Peoples -- I'm going to ask you to use your voice today to support Indigenous Peoples around the world and across the country. | Though you've probably already heard much of it, here's the synopsis: An oil pipeline (which counted Donald Trump as one of its investors) was rerouted from the predominantly white city of Bismarck to run directly through the treaty lands and drinking-water supply of the Standing Rock Sioux Tribe. When the tribe protested and filed a lawsuit, the National Guard was sent in. Protestors and activists who came to support the Standing Rock Sioux were met by weapons of war -- in fact, some of these federal agents were better armed than militaries, with weapons like surface-to-air missile launchers. After months, President Obama intervened, ordering an environmental review. But days after his inauguration, President Trump reversed the decision, and oil began flowing through the pipeline later that year. While last month's news that the pipeline must be emptied is undoubtedly something to celebrate, this is not the first or last battle in this centuries-old fight. The history of the Dakota Access Pipeline just shows how precarious Indigenous rights are and how committed we collectively need to be to protecting and advancing those rights. Thanks, Julian Brave NoiseCat Member of the Canim Lake Band Tsq'escen and a descendant of the Lil'Wat Nation of Mount Currie Advisory Board Member, Evergreen Action Vice President of Policy and Strategy, Data for Progress

body:
I just checked the list of donors who are committed to standing up against China, and I have yet to see your name on the list. I’m wondering if...... Peter, I just checked the list of donors who are committed to standing up against China, and I have yet to see your name on the list.
**[I’m wondering if I can count you in to join me in pushing back against this Radical Communist Regime who allowed our land of the free and home of the brave to suffer because of THEIR actions?](http://links.robportman.com/u/click?_t=15c7a5d863b14bd0a136c4fe6499ad25&_m=4ab4400414a74eec89d13ccdf25a7d6a&_e=tVnxmbsoYQRnPMAuezaoqWh-N-MhBq-P4djDWjQZN_9vHzSaNaW5Q6K-jS51DskaDBQoAFtYvD2h3HQHTC_oHTWsQ7VFJ1XAD36WWo7vCiMaYiWXKQIN5020-1ms8eqnhMgCybUgwG0oQUxXzeC7T4-ys7btacu_8bEFp23K-0Y2qa44LUU7J2h-FRlAJwahNUnas_qCfTVUIBX2vXgSwPL2oTspNPhbT1LTTycyIhMP-iz7mNlLIj0kkWD_WFn_PhML150H0YETWMUzZmxG-eCTW-b_H6e3eBDZ6-fXIl_8bqZOFnUInbon5jqUrtqtdXP9y7m4QN9JlJpHjTKh2Tqw2KVX6CJGFkuWv8_zjEjQVbxzs63y4G7vaEa5T7KwwuwdYq36DlrRnRsoS9RGhw7nM-fRAhwuTCPQ_FATPQM%3D)**
Peter, I really hope I can count on seeing your name appear.
Rob Portman Peter,
We’ve been paying the price of China’s lies for almost six months now.
That’s right, Peter. China lied about the severity of COVID-19. They actively worked to understate just how threatening the situation was. And now, the entire world is paying the price.
They must be held accountable.
But Peter, what’s almost just as bad? The fact that the Radical Far Left does not want to hold them accountable for their actions that have cost us countless lives.
That’s why I’m calling on you right now to join me in this fight to push back against the Chinese Communist Regime and the Radical-Left to let them know this will not stand in America.
**[Will you join me now in doing so?](http://links.robportman.com/u/click?_t=15c7a5d863b14bd0a136c4fe6499ad25&_m=4ab4400414a74eec89d13ccdf25a7d6a&_e=tVnxmbsoYQRnPMAuezaoqWh-N-MhBq-P4djDWjQZN_9vHzSaNaW5Q6K-jS51DskaDBQoAFtYvD2h3HQHTC_oHTWsQ7VFJ1XAD36WWo7vCiMaYiWXKQIN5020-1ms8eqnhMgCybUgwG0oQUxXzeC7T4-ys7btacu_8bEFp23K-0Y2qa44LUU7J2h-FRlAJwahpi0PW74VLN1HnIse7Qam1WYJjuTT-M9OSDWMFwEHm5wNEZcbjb0nQS0_YTLeNmUMfOh31oguCsd0Zriws9SnkhIMXkpGc5ogdUiJFPZ00ar7tnh1vmvtQBMgvceK2cXM0xg1tBKe8xNIVi5k6-j3rYVjT3KE1KGHb8eL67EOiFEHBztD1ttm0V7bNvmSyNqtA4iRRYtIXJG0oV_4hcwpoaOoIYxGdf-H_1lU2ekoECY%3D)** [**STAND UP TO CHINA**](http://links.robportman.com/u/click?_t=15c7a5d863b14bd0a136c4fe6499ad25&_m=4ab4400414a74eec89d13ccdf25a7d6a&_e=tVnxmbsoYQRnPMAuezaoqWh-N-MhBq-P4djDWjQZN_9vHzSaNaW5Q6K-jS51DskaDBQoAFtYvD2h3HQHTC_oHTWsQ7VFJ1XAD36WWo7vCiMaYiWXKQIN5020-1ms8eqnhMgCybUgwG0oQUxXzeC7T4-ys7btacu_8bEFp23K-0Y2qa44LUU7J2h-FRlAJwahuwJ3j5e0q4CqVd1ODsT77frZt5Zl6ANq2q8_Wl1IAkx5KxqtYAntBpspmDyAOfPoraSc3AtrTvT4LD-Mt8AMX-y4s2dZaaNbeqEjPA9fnrAThYLiBhmqU_fc4dPZh63XW8RfifsF5Kfjk9TufmmApGzAh5CrzD2hh6zK4fXMJLENDADOBk1lV3oX6OnxS3AQ5WmgSI7O-uH_0jjYdt6QMD5srVeDWYa3HYvi4tF8hQM%3D) Peter, we have stood by for far too long, and now we must take action. That’s why I need you to join me RIGHT NOW in chipping in to stop the Radical-Left and their allies, Communist China.
**[I hope I can count on you, Peter.](http://links.robportman.com/u/click?_t=15c7a5d863b14bd0a136c4fe6499ad25&_m=4ab4400414a74eec89d13ccdf25a7d6a&_e=tVnxmbsoYQRnPMAuezaoqWh-N-MhBq-P4djDWjQZN_9vHzSaNaW5Q6K-jS51DskaDBQoAFtYvD2h3HQHTC_oHTWsQ7VFJ1XAD36WWo7vCiMaYiWXKQIN5020-1ms8eqnhMgCybUgwG0oQUxXzeC7T4-ys7btacu_8bEFp23K-0Y2qa44LUU7J2h-FRlAJwah5bStPOnLSfXOrj6TJVsJli8UR6ucFPbYcrHck3QpQK7fcEwMkuFSkhCUyWiTT-d63dGU5wTGzFlhOSnGg_zVu5QtI3m2m6om7msyum24jG0Zj0xAWNHbGYt2gPEhyfhQMstE5eSLeingUGJrYgqccU4MeV78ununa_u-JGki0oDuUzp3Zw5WPkI69nJcLpy1Qi1FmBamdzJfu2iJ1TP5ekn3HLFdgGU-AXRqnf9OCoo%3D) **
And please, do not forget: China is to blame, but the Far-Left has stood by and fought any attempt to hold them accountable. We must stand strong against China’s lies. I hope you’ll join me, Peter.
Rob Portman

name: Joe Biden
subject: I'm counting on you tuning in, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
It would mean so much to know that you'll be watching during our big moment next week. |
---
Peter, We're just a week away from the beginning of the Democratic National Convention. This is a monumental occasion, not just for our team and my running mate, but for the whole country.

This is the moment when we come together to stand up as one party united in the battle for the soul of our nation, and I'm hoping you'll join me as I accept your nomination for President.

**Peter, I 'm so grateful to have you standing with me in this fight, and it would mean so much to know that you'll be watching during our big moment next week.**

[Will you answer our convention roll call and let me know if you'll be watching as I accept the nomination?](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb3b/1cd0ac28/17f722665/357ed9f3/3717241846/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/team-joe-convention-roll-call?source=JB_EM_POLL_2020.08.10_B2_conventionroll_X__F1_S2_C1__ns_full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_POLL_2020.08.10_B2_conventionroll_X__F1_S2_C1__ns_full") | **Peter Willis's Team Joe Convention Roll Call Status: Still Pending**

Peter, will you be virtually joining us for the Democratic National Convention on August 17-20?
Yes
No

What state will you be tuning in from?
SELECT HEREAKALARAZCACOCTDCDEFLGAHIIAIDILINKSKYLAMAMDMEMIMNMOMSMTNCNDNENHNJNMNVNYOHOKORPARISCSDTNTXUTVAVTWAWIWVWY\--AAAEAPASFMGUMHMPPRPWVI
---
| [COUNT ME IN!](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb3b/1cd0ac28/17f722665/357ed9f3/3717241846/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/team-joe-convention-roll-call?source=JB_EM_POLL_2020.08.10_B2_conventionroll_X__F1_S2_C1__ns_full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_POLL_2020.08.10_B2_conventionroll_X__F1_S2_C1__ns_full")
---
I've said it from the beginning, Peter, this is your campaign. And next week is when we'll get to see all the hard work we've done so far on display for the whole country to see.

Even though we won't be together in person, I can't wait to have you on my side as I become your official Democratic nominee for President.

And I hope we have a strong showing of people across the country joining the excitement of our virtual convention. By kicking off this event with everyday folks who are ready for a change in the White House, we're showing we've got what it takes to win in November.

**So, if you 're with me, Peter, will you take a second to answer our roll call now and let me know you'll be watching as our hard work comes to life at the convention?**

[https://go.joebiden.com/team-joe-convention-roll-call](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb3b/1cd0ac28/17f722665/357ed9f3/3717241846/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/team-joe-convention-roll-call?source=JB_EM_POLL_2020.08.10_B2_conventionroll_X__F1_S2_C1__ns_full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_POLL_2020.08.10_B2_conventionroll_X__F1_S2_C1__ns_full")

From the bottom of my heart, thank you for everything you've done leading up to this moment. I look forward to everything we're going to accomplish together over the next 85 days.

Joe Biden
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb3b/1cd0ac28/17f722665/357ed9f2/3717241846/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb3b/1cd0ac28/17f722665/357ed9f1/3717241846/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb3b/1cd0ac28/17f722665/357ed9f0/3717241846/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb3b/1cd0ac28/17f722665/357ed9ef/3717241846/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb3b/1cd0ac28/17f722665/357ed9ee/3717241846/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb3b/1cd0ac28/17f722665/357ed9ed/3717241846/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb3b/1cd0ac28/17f722665/357ed9ec/3717241846/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb3b/1cd0ac28/17f722665/357ed9eb/3717241846/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb3b/1cd0ac28/17f722665/357ed9ea/3717241846/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb3b/1cd0ac28/17f722665/357ed9e9/3717241846/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb3b/1cd0ac28/17f722665/357ed9ec/3717241846/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb3b/1cd0ac28/17f722665/357ed9e8/3717241846/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb3b/1cd0ac28/17f722665/357ed9eb/3717241846/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb3b/1cd0ac28/17f722665/357ed9e7/3717241846/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

And next week is when we'll get to see all the hard work we've done so far on display for the whole country to see. Even though we won't be together in person, I can't wait to have you on my side as I become your official Democratic nominee for President. And I hope we have a strong showing of people across the country joining the excitement of our virtual convention. By kicking off this event with everyday folks who are ready for a change in the White House, we're showing we've got what it takes to win in November. So, if you 're with me, Peter, will you take a second to answer our roll call now and let me know you'll be watching as our hard work comes to life at the convention? "" From the bottom of my heart, thank you for everything you've done leading up to this moment. I look forward to everything we're going to accomplish together over the next 85 days. Joe Biden | | "" "" "" "" Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. "" Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

body:

| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WtbngIgCft_UmS8CjHZiBaowNz0D2qOaPek8cnGFP9KIgY9H84mGKswWc8EeVlOGs9O_eesuO33jOVDbN_8RD-B291UDRscRpFYPd3-NvM_z306yKT0sOCw9renKibtgGgueWvIbeJ7I47kGIl5G28uo4gzFpr0VSFxJ5KQYC4eXZhUXLMG26g==&c=NmEAqP7RPoUWxrNUb0U4Qv3hWe4wB5DX1d5aGSIu8ccYsc1oF2Lu4g==&ch=fngjpHZK2KfYJD90wrE_U0iYxwhMjO8gVUBsV1XsmWoBN_qljUOpFw==)

| Peter,
In a recent Congressional hearing, I got to grill Big Tech CEOs on why their platforms consistently silence and shadow-ban conservatives. We all know it has been going on for years, and they may finally have to answer for it.

Big Tech used to tell us that it was "glitches" in their algorithms that took down conservative posts and removed right-leaning news outlets from search results. Now, they admit that there is a human component and that their employees can go rogue and silence conservative speech.
This power over our politics and engagement on the issues has created Silicon Valley tyrants who are out to steal the 2020 election.
Unfortunately, Big Tech has bought off most of Congress and will continue to go unchecked if we don't take a stand.
