name: =?utf-8?Q?Amanda?=
subject: Amanda Makki Gets Top Rating From NRA!
body:
| A Message From Amanda Makki For Congress | |
---
| | [ ](https://amandamakki.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6f583b85fa1158c72e40ebde1&id=420753a91a&e=ee1c0329b3)
---
| | **Amanda Makki Gets Top Rating From NRA!**
---
| **St. Petersburg, FL –** Friday, the National Rifle Association (NRA) gave frontrunner Amanda Makki the highest rating a non-incumbent candidate can get in an election cycle.

“As a concealed carry permit holder, and a strict interpreter of the Constitution, I fully-support our Second Amendment rights. The NRA has just given me and my campaign the highest ‘Aq’ rating, so you can take it to the bank, I will be your strongest advocate and champion in Congress against gun control liberals,” said Makki.
---
| [ ](https://amandamakki.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6f583b85fa1158c72e40ebde1&id=b1291d05a6&e=ee1c0329b3)
---
| As the Republican frontrunner candidate for Florida’s 13th Congressional District, Amanda Makki has received the endorsements from esteemed military veterans including Representative Lt. General Jack Bergman, the highest-ranking combat Veteran ever to serve in Congress, Senator Joni Ernst, the first female combat Veteran ever elected to the United States Senate, Congressmen Michael Waltz (Lt. Colonel), Congressman Neal Dunn (Major), and combat Veteran Robert O’Neill of the elite Navy SEAL Team 6.

In addition, she is endorsed by House Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy, Republican Whip Steve Scalise, Health Care Ranking Member and Physician Michael Burgess, as well as Florida Congressional Representatives John Rutherford and Neal Dunn. Locally, Amanda has the support of Seminole City Councilor Thom Barnhorn, Belleair Beach Mayor Joseph Manzo and Treasure Island Commissioner Tyler Payne. She was named to the National Republican Campaign Committee’s Young Guns program as one of the top “Contender” candidates.

Additionally, Amanda has received over 25 major endorsements including The American Conservative Union, the Conservative groups FreedomWorks, Republican Main Street Partnership PAC, and Maverick PAC as well as groups supporting the strongest female candidates in the U.S. including VIEW PAC, Maggie’s List, and Rep. Elise Stefanik’s E-PAC, that helps female GOP candidates. She is also supported by the American College of Emergency Physicians and Associated Builders & Contractors Florida Gulf Coast Chapter.
---
| ###
---

name: Kathy Manning
subject: This campaign is about you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
And that's why I want to hear from you today.
|
---

| | With less than three months to go until Election Day, normally, I would like to be out and about in the Triad, connecting with voters in-person, knocking on doors, and talking to folks about the issues that affect them every day. Unfortunately, we can't do that right now because of this terrible pandemic, but that doesn't make it any less important for me to hear from you -- far from it. It's more important than ever that we stay connected online. After all, this campaign is about you. [_**TAKE OUR OFFICIAL PRIORITIES SURVEY ->**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d297/3d199a51/2faab593/7364a997/2570488428/VEsH/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/e200810pet_nd") We're fighting to flip North Carolina's 6th District so we can make meaningful progress on affordable health care, high-quality education, and job opportunities. These are pillars of our campaign and they didn't come about by chance. They are the product of countless conversations I've had with North Carolinians about the issues that matter most to them. [_**So much has changed in our daily lives over the course of the last several months, and I want to check in with you and hear what issues are at the top of your mind as we approach November. Please take a moment to complete our Official Priorities Survey.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d297/3d199a51/2faab593/7364a997/2570488428/VEsE/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/e200810pet_nd") I look forward to reading your responses, Kathy |

name: Sandy Smith
subject: We need to do something
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i1KEhTt_03Nxmng&b=K0h_.2z8sgNHfQoCEVyMhA)
---

Dear Peter,

**I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district. **

I'm a fighter, and one of the conservative fighters I respected the most was always Herman Cain. His sudden passing saddens me beyond belief.
I had the great honor of meeting Mr. Cain a few years back when he gave the commencement speech at my son’s graduation. His speech and life story was very inspiring and motivating and proved with hard work and determination you can do anything. He was a true patriot and will be missed.
_**Herman Cain is a hero - and his American Dream is one for the history books**_. He rose from destitute poverty to become CEO of Godfather's Pizza, a radio host, a Presidential candidate, and a Chairman of a Federal Reserve Bank. He grew up in a three room house, sometimes sleeping on the floor- to parents who worked five jobs between them. He beat Stage IV cancer before he accomplished much of his biggest feats.
**_Clearly this is someone that the country should mourn. _**
But are Democrats mourning Herman Cain? No. They rejoice in his passing, in the most ghoulish fashion possible. They mock Mr. Cain and the President, such is their hatred:
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i1KEhTt_03Nxmng&b=K0h_.2z8sgNHfQoCEVyMhA)
---
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i1KEhTt_03Nxmng&b=K0h_.2z8sgNHfQoCEVyMhA)
---
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i1KEhTt_03Nxmng&b=K0h_.2z8sgNHfQoCEVyMhA)
---

**_We just got lectured by the far Left for 2 months about how "Black Lives Matter". They burned black-owned businesses, killed black people (including children), and destroyed black communities. _**

Now they rejoice in the death of one of the most prominent black politicians of the 21st Century.

_What can we learn from this?_

**The radical Left doesn't care who you are. They don't care where you live or your creed or race. If you disagree with them in the slightest, they will attack you and rejoice in your death. **

__Can you imagine if they took power? Do you want your family to be at the mercy of a party and a terrorist movement (Antifa) that wishes for your death?__

[If that isn't YOUR vision for America, I need your help to change Congress and evict Pelosi!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i1KEhTt_03Nxmng&b=K0h_.2z8sgNHfQoCEVyMhA)

clean_body: | | | Dear Peter, I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district. I'm a fighter, and one of the conservative fighters I respected the most was always Herman Cain. His sudden passing saddens me beyond belief. I had the great honor of meeting Mr. Cain a few years back when he gave the commencement speech at my son’s graduation. His speech and life story was very inspiring and motivating and proved with hard work and determination you can do anything. He was a true patriot and will be missed. Herman Cain is a hero - and his American Dream is one for the history books. He rose from destitute poverty to become CEO of Godfather's Pizza, a radio host, a Presidential candidate, and a Chairman of a Federal Reserve Bank. He grew up in a three room house, sometimes sleeping on the floor- to parents who worked five jobs between them. He beat Stage IV cancer before he accomplished much of his biggest feats. Clearly this is someone that the country should mourn. But are Democrats mourning Herman Cain? No. They rejoice in his passing, in the most ghoulish fashion possible. They mock Mr. Cain and the President, such is their hatred: We just got lectured by the far Left for 2 months about how "Black Lives Matter". They burned black-owned businesses, killed black people (including children), and destroyed black communities. Now they rejoice in the death of one of the most prominent black politicians of the 21st Century. What can we learn from this? The radical Left doesn't care who you are. They don't care where you live or your creed or race. If you disagree with them in the slightest, they will attack you and rejoice in your death. Can you imagine if they took power? Do you want your family to be at the mercy of a party and a terrorist movement (Antifa) that wishes for your death? I will NEVER support the radical Left. AOC and her insane leftist agenda can pound sand! , with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out my opponent, one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants, would be a crippling blow to the Democrat Socialists and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda. G.K. Butterfield is a Swampy leftist, not a patriot, but to replace him I . I appreciate you and thank you. Let's do this! For God and Country, Sandy Smith Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District Conservative Entrepreneur & Military mom P.S. I need to reach my goal to catch up with Butterfield. Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

name: Ossoff for Senate
subject: Jon at home
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
He recorded a video from home. |
---
Friend,

Jon Ossoff and his wife, Dr. Alisha Kramer, were quarantining at home after Alisha, an OB-GYN, tested positive for COVID-19 a few weeks ago.

And that's where Jon filmed this new video.

**[In the video, Jon implores politicians to stop playing games with American lives -- and calls on all Americans to do their part in slowing down the spread of the virus. Watch it here>>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e27db/5b2c1286/3ea6d33c/25f1e2db/1110606596/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_10_at_home_vid?refcode=em_2020_08_10_at_home_vid")** [](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e27db/5b2c1286/3ea6d33c/25f1e2db/1110606596/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_10_at_home_vid?refcode=em_2020_08_10_at_home_vid") We've known COVID-19 was a major threat for months now. But while many countries have gotten the virus under control, cases and deaths continue to spike across the U.S.

_Why?_

**Because corrupt politicians like Donald Trump and David Perdue wasted time downplaying the threat instead of formulating a national strategy to contain the virus, which has become a major public health and economic disaster on their watch.**

We need to listen to medical experts, coordinate a national testing strategy, and get everyone to wear a mask. Unfortunately, our current leadership is taking none of these steps, and everyday Americans are paying the price.

**Nurses and doctors, like Alisha, are doing their jobs -- it's time for politicians to do theirs.**

**[Right now, watch Jon's video message from home>>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e27db/5b2c1286/3ea6d33c/25f1e2db/1110606596/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_10_at_home_vid?refcode=em_2020_08_10_at_home_vid")** | | [Watch now!](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e27db/5b2c1286/3ea6d33c/25f1e2db/1110606596/VEsC/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_10_at_home_vid?refcode=em_2020_08_10_at_home_vid")

name: Kat Cammack
subject: Polls: We're ahead by 10%
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| Patriot,

We are incredibly excited to see our momentum and hard work paying off, but the reality is that we need to have a strong finish in order to win.
In a poll released today, we are leading with 25% of the vote at just eight days out from the election-- that's 10 points ahead of our nearest competitor. Our grassroots team is not letting up. Each and every day we are sign-waving at the polls, continuing to knock on doors, and keeping up with phone calls to voters.
In an election like this one, every last vote and dollar matters. But, we are being outspent by millionaire self-funders and we need your help to get over the finish line.
[Please consider making a donation to ensure we are victorious in just eight short days. ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Q_eTpLX7bo45Ltgo7ZcRsZbi4hm8RjqRRx_ShaiFXLFCs1c0u_3ZW9BTVDhSa95-cxL-649Q5fBH2Zoj1cU0Sh8uMH4KELcWxtSYgaT-_mikBM5_owu1WgbyJawLoZNl5FR0ffNj8riFVB1GXAKQHaOJzJZf0JlTPxDa6hIUYEE=&c=Yvr1vxCaUCTrF1e1KtM5pgYU1G55ebRBN1EEeSvzleBxqQn68aXaPQ==&ch=P_rB2-0DuRa6WN1FcD3f0ynyE_LMlwJSz6bpdH42X6TNf-X32AVjMw==)
In my experience, those who trail in the polls in the final days tend to resort to nasty tactics and underhanded political attacks to try and bring a person down, but we will keep working until the final hours of this primary. I can assure you of that.
I am so grateful to my team, our army of volunteers, and our supporters, like you, who are making this happen. Keep pushing. Help us not let up. Let's do this thing!

name: =?utf-8?Q?Nancy=20Mace?=
subject: we can do better than cancel culture
body:
I’ll be blunt — cancel culture is a direct attack on the values that have made our country exceptional, and we must stand against it at every turn. | | | [View In Your Browser](https://mailchi.mp/025ffde55ae6/how-we-flip-the-house-2088338?e=f1831b4ca2) [Forward To A Friend](http://us7.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=b6c3ce9545&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| | [](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=b41e2eeb89&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| Friend -

_I’ll be blunt — cancel culture is a direct attack on the freedom and values that have made our country exceptional, and we must stand against it at every turn. _ Cancel culture seeks to restrict freedom of expression and punishes people who speak out against the progressive left or challenge their worldview. It’s toxic and irreconcilable with our values as a nation.

[Stand up to cancel culture >>>>>](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=d2b7bf8139&e=f1831b4ca2)

**America is a land of second chances, I know this firsthand. We also value freedom of expression. These values have been critical to our success as a nation and it breaks my heart to see them under attack.**

The American Dream itself is dependent on these values. Punishing people with social exile and economic ruin for a regretful tweet from 8 years ago or expressing differing points of view does not make our country stronger or any more moral.

We must be able to speak our minds without fear. The marketplace of ideas is going to be an absolutely crucial tool for solving the problems we’re facing, even when we disagree. We cannot allow the mob to shut down healthy debate.

Standing up to cancel culture isn’t going to be easy, and it’s going to take thousands of voices speaking up across our country. Can I count on you?

[Join me in standing up to cancel culture and add your name >>>>>](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=9d3d6f400d&e=f1831b4ca2)

Thank you for reading,

Nancy Mace

---

| | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=d3f486c2ca&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | Dear Friend,
Over the weekend, Donald Trump issued an executive order deferring collection of the payroll tax under the guise of pandemic-related economic relief. In reality, this is a continuation of the long-term Republican strategy to defund Social Security since the payroll tax is the primary source of funds for Social Security.

Donald Trump promised that, if re-elected in November, he would seek to eliminate the payroll tax permanently.

Let’s be clear: Donald Trump just pledged to defund Social Security if re-elected in November.

Jackie Walorski also wants to destroy the public good which is Social Security. Her solution, however, is to privatize and thus destroy our Social Security retirement savings. [Have a listen.](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=8d46165d01&e=5886ca081d)

[**Pat Hackett wants to protect and expand your Social Security benefits, not destroy them.**](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=c30df480d7&e=5886ca081d)

name: Powered By People (BetoORourke.com)
subject: We're taking things to the next level
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
The response to our organizing, so far, has been overwhelmingly positive. We’re ready to take our efforts to the next level -- but our new plans will dramatically increase our operating costs.
#
By now, you're likely aware that right now, our two biggest goals are 1) winning Democratic majority in the State House, and 2) stopping Donald Trump forever by denying him Texas's 38 electoral college votes.
In service of that goal, we've registered thousands of Democratic voters in Texas, promoted Democratic candidates from the local to federal levels, and made over 2.25 million calls to contact voters in the state.
**The response to our organizing, so far, has been overwhelmingly positive.** We're ready to take our efforts to the next level -- but our new plans will dramatically increase our operating costs.
**[Can we count on you to chip in $3 to help fund our expanding initiatives? Early voting starts in just 64 days, and we need to invest now:](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43005?refcode=ema20200810-100842&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=100842%2E444211%2EO0eNbU)**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43005?refcode=ema20200810-100842&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=100842%2E444211%2EO0eNbU)**
Your financial support will help us:
* Operate expensive (but well worth it) tools for dialing, texting, and emailing voters
* Recruit volunteers for voter contact and GOTV events
* Grow our base of support here in Texas and across the country
* And more

In order for us to get what we want -- to flip Texas blue and stop Trump forever -- it's going to take tens of thousands of us putting in the work needed to win. **[Make a contribution of $3 today so we can keep organizing better and stronger to register, contact, and motivate new Texas voters this year.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43005?refcode=ema20200810-100842&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=100842%2E444211%2EO0eNbU)**
Thanks,
The Powered By People team

Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople.org](http://www.poweredxpeople.org?akid=100842%2E444211%2EO0eNbU), not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We are powered by grassroots supporters like you. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=100842%2E444211%2EO0eNbU).

name: Biden for President
subject: Peter, make your first donation + help us reach 3 million donors
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Pitch in $5 or more today to power our campaign and we'll send you a sticker to say thanks |
---
Peter,

We are officially in the home stretch of this campaign -- less than 90 days to go! -- and we're proud and excited that we are inching closer to our milestone goal of 3 million donors.

Grassroots donors have sacrificed tremendously in the midst of these unconventional times to power our campaign to elect Joe and defeat Donald Trump -- and we're so grateful for everything supporters like you have done to fuel this fight.

But here's the thing, Peter: After putting up an incredibly strong showing in May and June, our team of grassroots donors was outraised by Donald Trump last month, and we really need a surge of support from first-time donors to make sure it doesn't happen again.

**Winning this race won't be easy -- and we have to keep pace with Trump's fundraising machine to do it. So, if you're able to step up today, we need you now more than ever.**

[Peter, can we count on you to be one of the 2025 first-time donors in Pennsylvania we need to step up today? Chip in $5 or more to put us on track to outraising Trump this month, and we'll send you this exclusive Team Joe Sticker >>](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_teamjoesticker_nd?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.10_B3_3milbump_X__F1_S2_C1__nd&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.10_B3_3milbump_X__F1_S2_C1__nd") | | | [](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_teamjoesticker_nd?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.10_B3_3milbump_X__F1_S2_C1__nd&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.10_B3_3milbump_X__F1_S2_C1__nd")

| [Other ➞](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_teamjoesticker_nd?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.10_B3_3milbump_X__F1_S2_C1__nd&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.10_B3_3milbump_X__F1_S2_C1__nd")

**Three million donors is no small number.** Hitting this milestone will send a loud and clear signal to the world about the strength of our message, the diversity of our coalition, and -- most of all -- that people are fired up for a change in the Oval Office.

But there's still so much work to do. Donald Trump and the RNC are going to make this a fight until the bitter end, and we'll need to push just as hard to ensure we emerge victorious this November.

So we've got to pick up the pace to close the fundraising gap between us and Trump to fund our plan to win on November 3rd.

That's where you come in, Peter. We know it will take everything we've got, and while we hate asking for your money -- especially at a time like this -- your contribution makes a huge impact in fueling this fight because you represent the America that Donald Trump turned his back on.

**So we have to ask one more time for your support. We know there's nothing that can stand in our way of beating Trump and electing Joe this November -- but we'll only get there together, Peter.**

[Will you step up today and become one of the 2025 first-time donors in Pennsylvania we need to outraise Trump this month and cross our 3 million grassroots donors milestone? Pitch in $5 or more today to power our campaign and we'll send you a sticker to say thanks >>](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_teamjoesticker_nd?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.10_B3_3milbump_X__F1_S2_C1__nd&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.10_B3_3milbump_X__F1_S2_C1__nd")

Thanks for your support, Peter. We're getting closer to the big day, and with you on our side, we know for sure we'll win.

Biden for President

| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb4e/1cd0ac28/160a8af1f/357ee274/2164717144/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb4e/1cd0ac28/160a8af1f/357ee273/2164717144/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb4e/1cd0ac28/160a8af1f/357ee272/2164717144/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb4e/1cd0ac28/160a8af1f/357ee271/2164717144/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb4e/1cd0ac28/160a8af1f/357ee270/2164717144/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb4e/1cd0ac28/160a8af1f/357ee26f/2164717144/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb4e/1cd0ac28/160a8af1f/357ee26e/2164717144/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb4e/1cd0ac28/160a8af1f/357ee26d/2164717144/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb4e/1cd0ac28/160a8af1f/357ee26c/2164717144/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb4e/1cd0ac28/160a8af1f/357ee26b/2164717144/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb4e/1cd0ac28/160a8af1f/357ee26e/2164717144/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb4e/1cd0ac28/160a8af1f/357ee26a/2164717144/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb4e/1cd0ac28/160a8af1f/357ee26d/2164717144/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb4e/1cd0ac28/160a8af1f/357ee269/2164717144/VEsEAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

CONFIDENTIAL CAMPAIGN STRATEGY: PLEASE DON’T SHARE.
Friend,

I’ll get right to it.

November 3rd is coming at us fast and I’m prepared to do whatever it takes to secure another victory for President Trump.

The President said that you’re one of his strongest allies. I always trust what he thinks, so I only have one question for you: are you ready to fight alongside me and CRUSH Joe Biden on Election Day?

I know you’re up for the challenge. You’ve been a strong supporter of the President since the very beginning, which is why I need you to take the Official 2020 Campaign Strategy Survey.

This survey is strictly confidential and is meant for your eyes only. It should go without saying, but please, do NOT forward this to anyone.

http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=cc9a966aa481f08a5cca0854e75f25fceb176644f5f5ab07e94428ade52c25f8c62507214d5bfed7a7462621616492f236a38a706cf9de24

name: Eric Holcomb
subject: re: checking in on you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
The last couple of months have been pretty tough for businesses and workers across our state, and I wanted to make sure that you were holding up okay. | |
---
| [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=53ad89d27a334b258ae1d36c3e3292d3&_e=qa7Zpt0AlpjVFLIBMjjm9WOYByPfQcpCxUTXqQRfVy-KjLBnaqRb8bKHho6VdQR2Z2_03StKFAqiHV9DC4N0kTT2yvg6NDlWx3CKn0H10ow8jWcxUVCQ488j0C4OLITW3SlM5C-0EohRTmUkDOb23bYHFAycQdSCXT3BTJOfLnsBEmodcRbQUqxCrNS239BURIoYt37lbUSkaCLuXIcDDR1kFHaaExaGjw0BuTDGjeX7Wa1jQpmo_rqQeZvsrL-asqUhN2YL8AbTSD3K3LJ4PXJxEofPvAPol9RcH2aUxn1RW6d0ryUcTZek920dEeGcJWhqfhJKVrIrgiOf6ikMM7iqo9Odg8tylOe8REyIrm4sO8H99Njcck7rP_W4I-b5AIdWN_MNwX3twCi7HrfLx-aCI0m-YlGeSDI3QkSRFNi8LkRKI-tcJ7bu9RTIwBXHqTvOtIbSkFE4u3Vb73vsN1wmUiBfNl0x9FcN-YpkjQM%3D) |
---|---|---
|
---
Hey friend — have a second?

I just wanted to reach out quickly and check in on you.

The last couple of months have been pretty tough for Hoosier businesses and workers across our state, and I wanted to reach out to see how you are holding up.

**We’re going to come back stronger than ever and trust me, I won’t rest until our economy is setting records again. We’re going to build a One Indiana that delivers the promise of American prosperity to every single Hoosier.**

As we continue to fight this pandemic here at home, there’s going to continue to be difficult decisions ahead of us -- but know that **my focus will remain on saving lives, fighting the spread, and supporting the Hoosiers who are working so hard to reopen our state. **

But in the meantime, I wanted to give you a chance to get any concerns you might have off of your chest. I had my team build out a comment box below so that you could share your thoughts with me.

If you want to share, please fill out the comment box below.
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=53ad89d27a334b258ae1d36c3e3292d3&_e=qa7Zpt0AlpjVFLIBMjjm9WOYByPfQcpCxUTXqQRfVy-KjLBnaqRb8bKHho6VdQR2Z2_03StKFAqiHV9DC4N0kTT2yvg6NDlWx3CKn0H10ow8jWcxUVCQ488j0C4OLITW3SlM5C-0EohRTmUkDOb23bYHFAycQdSCXT3BTJOfLnsBEmodcRbQUqxCrNS239BURIoYt37lbUSkaCLuXIcDDR1kFHaaExaGjw0BuTDGjeX7Wa1jQpmo_rqQeZvsrL-asqUhN2YL8AbTSD3K3LJ4PdzyIr-qhDAS_iKiEPzhVrrSTbt7_wbO4ut5LkChYUgnp6suc871NCVFKCzM9q59adbc1YOCOlt6SaXe7cXfNahR-KBs52T9CmNFF4Azwve7O30RoL6DEasBhfMHFvPjD6UmMZiZOptbMg6GN-69HoyiyglJQBT192XauCvZDq04NhTM7jvai7LQu6TFn-kEHvOzXp-8SIgXM8cBnsUjc48%3D)
Thank you for sharing your story,

Eric Holcomb

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Join the band of rebels . . .
body:
Last night, something unexpected happened.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-387822-914372-5136170-7de3a8a793-66b0679e71)
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-387822-914372-5136170-7de3a8a793-66b0679e71) Last night, something unexpected happened.

As I attended a GOP event at the Trump International Golf Club, Congressman Matt Gaetz took to the podium and said this . . .

**“When we find folks who they try to disappear or silence because they chose to speak out, we need to have their back! And that’s why I’m proud to endorse Laura Loomer for Congress.”**
I’m sure you’ve heard of Matt Gaetz or at least you’ve seen how much the liberal media has attacked his America First message over the years as he represents the people of Florida.

I’m deeply honored to have the support of a man I respect so much.

In addition to Rep. Gaetz, Roger Stone was at the event as well and gave another round of support to my campaign by saying, “You need her in Washington fighting for you. We need her in Washington to join the band of rebels because she is courageous. She is knowledgeable. She is fearless.”

That “Band of Rebels” that my friend Roger Stone was referring to is Rep. Gaetz, Rep. Gosar and a handful of other Republican leaders who fearlessly put America First regardless of the onslaught of attacks coming from Democrats and their Fake News Media.

**And that Band of Rebels around the nation . . . well, that’s us.**

That’s you and me and thousands of other Americans who boldly stand by President Trump and dedicate our time and money to the conservative cause.

If you can, [**I ask that you double down in your support of my campaign and help me get to Washington so I can join Congressmen Gaetz and Gosar in defending America**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-387822-914372-5136170-7de3a8a793-66b0679e71).

With just 85 days until Election Day, we’re still behind the fundraising advantage of my radical Democrat opponent and have so much more to do.

Right now, we’re building a war chest for a massive media purchase to blanket the airwaves to reach Republicans, swing Democrats and independents. By Primary Day, we need to raise another $100,000 to be on track for our goal.

[**Can you pitch in now? Even $10 will help us reach 400 voters in the district.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-387822-914372-5136170-7de3a8a793-66b0679e71)

Thanks again for all that you do and please help me hit our goal [by pitching in today](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-387822-914372-5136170-7de3a8a793-66b0679e71).

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

subject: Communist China is "sanctioning" me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
This past Sunday, China sanctioned me again, along with five other U.S. lawmakers. Peter, This past Sunday, China sanctioned me again, along with five other U.S. lawmakers.
Over the past few months, I have been criticizing China for their reckless handling of the coronavirus and calling attention to Beijing’s oppression of Uyghurs and other ethnic minorities in the country’s Xinjiang region. **They are trying to intimidate us into submission, but we will not stand for this!**
China is running scared, and we finally have a Senate and president that won’t let their actions go unnoticed. **Help us continue to reveal China’s illegal actions!** [_**Help to Hold Communist China Accountable >>>**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=2818798a26d3493a8b390e85a949a05f&_e=a5DrLSRJC8srQUWvu4MItSziqS21SjckPAp9wt__GrpNDAJojyuTyZiLXZd3uO-4ffhjYcNTs_Cbs2dpiQ9M82H659oFvPhUy4XCMyZlcMb7GnLt7NqwpsoDJcCOatOegdXQXxnnhpVpi-KJPNCr7UoHiU9QWymmpNeUiGdEaIGeXjqdD7dsdKV4u6sa8fJvEN3v3mpRD-c-selIaUoDpylmymB7l2AZ4KvZ4fKHvzakWnrs36l1RHC5wk9JgUq3BMlSHhSeXhjw4oLcCcQKx-0zHfefNehHlK-xmX_4jNZkL1UiN5mBiI-wGeG_W41YBVBp4DftUaUmAvlfL1AMetkB2PdkQCOtlTNB4Sf5T979Rbp4aX5r-LGy3ivXMF3NA24mQWh9o7kr_VlNyEbb-iwtZL9NAD3C4QbQCT9PeYQ%3D) Now is the time to stay tough on China. Help us continue to reveal China’s illegal actions! Now is the time to stay tough on China. They have always been a bad actor, and we will continue to expose their illegal actions. Please, stand with me and add your voice to this critically important conversation today. Sincerely, Josh Hawley | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate

body:
We’re just 85 days from Election Day, and those 85 days will be critical. We’ll be talking to voters, sharing our message, and putting in the hard... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/this-saturday?e=1acd9bb3d6)

| Hoosier Republicans,

We’re just 85 days from Election Day, and those 85 days are **_critical_**. We're talking with voters, sharing our message, and putting in the hard work it takes to elect Republican leaders statewide.

But we can’t do it alone – we need your help this Saturday.

We know grassroots Republicans like you are looking for the best way to help elect strong Republicans in 2020 -- and one simple way is participating in our Super Saturday events!

**Our next Super Saturday is this Saturday, August 15th. **We'll be talking with voters about the election in November, and the reasons why it's critical we support our Republican team up and down the ballot,_**starting with President Trump, Vice President Pence, Governor Holcomb, Lt. Governor Crouch, and Republican AG nominee Todd Rokita!**_ ** ** [**\-- > Click here to sign up for our Super Saturday event <\--**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fb9a7dc859&e=1acd9bb3d6)
[Sign up](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ea26861bc4&e=1acd9bb3d6), and a member of our team will reach out to you to sign you up for a shift (or two). They'll provide you with all the information you need to have a successful day representing your Indiana Republican Party!

Your volunteering will be the difference-maker this year!** Let's keep the momentum going, so we can ensure Republican success in November!**

-Your Indiana Republican Party

body:
This Convention will be the first of its kind. This is a historic moment to bring more Americans to our campaign than ever before. |

Peter -- The Democratic National Convention is one week from today -- and if we want to show the strength of Team Joe to the country, we'll need your help. The Convention is an opportunity for you to join supporters near you to watch together _online_. You might meet a few of your neighbors who are just as fired up about electing Joe as you are. **[Can we count on you to host a virtual watch party in Pennsylvania? Sign up here»](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb46/1cd0ac28/160c6afc2/357ee81c/786437913/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.mobilize.us/backtobluepa/host/?source=JB_EM_ORG_2020.08.10_B8_convention-host-2_X__F1_S1_C1__vol&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=JB_EM_ORG_2020.08.10_B8_convention-host-2_X__F1_S1_C1__vol&utm_term=pa")** This Convention will be the first of its kind. All eyes will be on our team as our future running mate addresses the country for the first time and Joe accepts the Democratic presidential nomination. Let's come together (virtually) to show our support and cheer on our future president and vice president. **[It isn't too late to add your name to our list -- we'll make it easy and fun too. Sign up to become an official Team Joe Convention host!](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb46/1cd0ac28/160c6afc2/357ee81c/786437913/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.mobilize.us/backtobluepa/host/?source=JB_EM_ORG_2020.08.10_B8_convention-host-2_X__F1_S1_C1__vol&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=JB_EM_ORG_2020.08.10_B8_convention-host-2_X__F1_S1_C1__vol&utm_term=pa")** Thanks for all your hard work. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Coronavirus response: President Trump vs. the Swamp
body:
Democrats in Congress wasted weeks of negotiations with Treasury Secretary Steven Mnuchin and White House Chief of Staff Mark Meadows ... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=770bfda6b3&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • August 10, 2020
---
| | |
# **Coronavirus response: President Trump vs. the Swamp**

**Democrats in Congress **wasted extensive negotiations with Treasury Secretary Steven Mnuchin and White House Chief of Staff Mark Meadows about an expanded Coronavirus relief package. Democrat leaders were not only willing _but determined_ to withhold vital assistance for families to use it as a political bargaining chip for their radical agenda.

**Since Congress wouldn’t** act to help the American people, President Trump did.

**He issued four major** executive actions over the weekend:
* [**The first**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3b5840ea2e&e=3ee4985eea) provides out-of-work Americans with $400-per-week in supplemental aid on top of existing unemployment benefits.

* [**The second**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=42c134bd09&e=3ee4985eea) assists renters and homeowners who are struggling to pay their lease or make their mortgage payment.

* [**The third**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c14835d6f4&e=3ee4985eea) defers payroll taxes for employees making $100,000 or less per year through the end of the year.

* [**The fourth**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3cb5e897e0&e=3ee4985eea) suspends federal student loan payments and sets interest rates to 0 percent through the end of the year.

**Sadly, the Swamp’s** dysfunction is nothing new. When the Coronavirus first reached our shores earlier this year, Congressional Democrats were busy playing another partisan game—a historic impeachment hoax that alleged no actual criminal violations by the President.

**While Congress was mired** in impeachment theater, President Trump responded to early information about the Coronavirus by creating a White House Task Force and restricting travel to the United States from China. At the time, both Democrats and the World Health Organization criticized the travel ban as unnecessary, even “xenophobic.”

**Then, as soon as cases** began to rise, President Trump released guidance to slow the spread of the disease. Dr. Anthony Fauci and Dr. Deborah Birx both attested to the fact that the President took serious action as soon as the data was presented to him.

🎬 [**WATCH: Congressional Democrats stonewalled unemployment relief**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=59723895d2&e=3ee4985eea)

**Later, while Democrats** in Washington were wasting time using the global pandemic as a political weapon against Republicans, President Trump was leading the largest mobilization of U.S. industry since World War II. As a result, America built the world’s leading testing system from scratch—one that has now conducted over 65 million tests.

**President Trump knows** the best strategy moving forward is to protect our most vulnerable populations, including seniors, while helping more communities to safely reopen. As regional Coronavirus hot spots have emerged, President Trump has surged resources to impacted areas while enabling us to prevent another nationwide shutdown.

**Never-ending lockdowns** would hurt American workers, families, businesses, and schoolchildren. They threaten our most vulnerable communities and would worsen income and educational inequality.

**Starting in January** , President Trump took actions to protect our homeland, our economy, and our workforce from the Coronavirus. Rather than join him in bipartisan cooperation, Democrats in Washington decided once again to put partisan politics over patriotism.

[**Press Secretary: Politics as usual have no place during this pandemic.**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=19ccb82c62&e=3ee4985eea)

**IN-DEPTH:**[**President Trump’s historic Coronavirus response**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=822ddeaed5&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Jobs numbers beat expectations for third month in a row**

**U.S. job numbers** for the month of July came out on Friday, and once again they beat expert predictions—this time by nearly 300,000 jobs.

**Nearly 2 million** jobs were added last month in total. More than 9 million jobs have been added over the past three months, showing the resilience of the U.S. economy and marking the beginning of a Great American Comeback from the COVID-19 pandemic.

**May, June, and July** became “the single greatest three-month period of job creation in American history,” President Trump said on Friday. By comparison, it took well over four years for America to add 9 million jobs in the aftermath of the Great Recession.

🎬 [**Larry Kudlow: “We had another great month of jobs!”**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e1295f67c4&e=3ee4985eea)

**READ:**[**Encouraging signs for the Great American Comeback**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=edfde44830&e=3ee4985eea)

clean_body: Democrats in Congress wasted weeks of negotiations with Treasury Secretary Steven Mnuchin and White House Chief of Staff Mark Meadows ... | | | | | The White House • August 10, 2020 | | | Coronavirus response: President Trump vs. the Swamp Democrats in Congress wasted extensive negotiations with Treasury Secretary Steven Mnuchin and White House Chief of Staff Mark Meadows about an expanded Coronavirus relief package. Democrat leaders were not only willing but determined to withhold vital assistance for families to use it as a political bargaining chip for their radical agenda. Since Congress wouldn’t act to help the American people, President Trump did. He issued four major executive actions over the weekend: provides out-of-work Americans with $400-per-week in supplemental aid on top of existing unemployment benefits. assists renters and homeowners who are struggling to pay their lease or make their mortgage payment. defers payroll taxes for employees making $100,000 or less per year through the end of the year. suspends federal student loan payments and sets interest rates to 0 percent through the end of the year. Sadly, the Swamp’s dysfunction is nothing new. When the Coronavirus first reached our shores earlier this year, Congressional Democrats were busy playing another partisan game—a historic impeachment hoax that alleged no actual criminal violations by the President. While Congress was mired in impeachment theater, President Trump responded to early information about the Coronavirus by creating a White House Task Force and restricting travel to the United States from China. At the time, both Democrats and the World Health Organization criticized the travel ban as unnecessary, even “xenophobic.” Then, as soon as cases began to rise, President Trump released guidance to slow the spread of the disease. Dr. Anthony Fauci and Dr. Deborah Birx both attested to the fact that the President took serious action as soon as the data was presented to him. 🎬 Later, while Democrats in Washington were wasting time using the global pandemic as a political weapon against Republicans, President Trump was leading the largest mobilization of U.S. industry since World War II. As a result, America built the world’s leading testing system from scratch—one that has now conducted over 65 million tests. President Trump knows the best strategy moving forward is to protect our most vulnerable populations, including seniors, while helping more communities to safely reopen. As regional Coronavirus hot spots have emerged, President Trump has surged resources to impacted areas while enabling us to prevent another nationwide shutdown. Never-ending lockdowns would hurt American workers, families, businesses, and schoolchildren. They threaten our most vulnerable communities and would worsen income and educational inequality. Starting in January , President Trump took actions to protect our homeland, our economy, and our workforce from the Coronavirus. Rather than join him in bipartisan cooperation, Democrats in Washington decided once again to put partisan politics over patriotism. We won't be able to enact the bold, transformative change our country urgently needs unless Democrats can win at every level and in every single state. | |

We’re fewer than 90 days out, Derek. This final stretch of the election is the most critical yet, and I’m going to spend these last few months working to ensure victory for Democrats on Election Day -- not just my campaign at the top of the ticket. Sure, my biggest concern is beating Donald Trump. But we won't be able to enact the bold, transformative change our country urgently needs unless Democrats can win at every level and in _every single state_. I’m committed to campaigning everywhere -- even in places where I might not win -- because down-ballot Democrats stand a fighting chance. This election has always been about so much more than just one person, one candidate, or one office. It's about restoring the soul of our nation, Derek, and that is a feat that will take all of us rising together. Democrats in tight races everywhere need your strong support, which is why -- with just 25 days until the first votes of this general election are cast -- I am asking you personally for your help: **Will you split a $10 donation between my campaign and the DNC today? With just a few months before Election Day, time is running out to make investments that will have a big impact from the top of the ticket to the bottom.**

** ** **** ** There’s no doubt that these past few years have been trying, but I’m proud of the progress we’ve made despite the challenges. The team at the DNC has overhauled our party’s tech and data infrastructure, hired and trained organizers in key battleground states, and installed voter protection directors in the states most vulnerable to Republican voter suppression tactics. Because of this work, we have a real, fighting chance to win in November -- and I’m not just talking about my own campaign. Democrats nationwide have the power to turn the page on Trump's ugly brand of politics -- but not without each person on this team chipping in what they can and getting involved. None of our progress so far would be possible without the support of Democrats like you, Derek, but I'm being honest when I say that our hard work could be for nothing if we don't follow through over these final, crucial months. **[While there’s still time left to move the needle in this race, will you make a $10 investment in my campaign and the DNC? Our chances of taking back the White House, flipping the Senate, and building a bench deep enough to make transformational change in this country depends on support from folks like you.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zC3cTBFFf8FnlNVXjCQrMMeLatRak05VGlwx4yj7TM7IY5RCTdzPEA79w_8u4xRVP5WcJ6ircuKZ5VYusZaucds3Vzv7xroA3BVOR69GCwSEdSRbdmLTSbRWS6xim3NJzpMSyPEq_a_fZeu8akWwCC_SM4lHtqS412ojDzJXkCzlQR770ySc1aE0daw-nUQO-lkVWB47awkJYAZrT4gDnU0p8zNoxee6_qwR2lp8gbcyPrkUSoiRbIei4S_zS8OgPf95sUXxntoIEK8LGeJnWO1rnUvMfnghF-1fSo46duRfQNXIIS0l6Rp5846-NaFvs/347/Shjo3otfSt2bYJBjm3kuwg/h6/FQYh4wzpY6ibzuG3kW2HQxFMKdXa7Im-hxY2pB3Zn50)** Thanks again, Joe Joe Biden P.S.
